ProGlide Hydra Smooth™ Shave Gel
The Fusion ProGlide Hydrating formula, with Shea Butter and Glycerin, helps keep your skin hydrated during the shave and helps reduce the look and feel of shaving irritation for a smooth shave.
Thermal Scrub
Warms, deep cleans and helps soften facial hair before shaving. In this innovative formula, heating technology is activated on contact with water to provide warming comfort.
Intense Cooling Lotion
A unique, 2-in-1 lightweight aftershave lotion formula that helps provide instant cooling relief for just shaved skin. It hydrates to improve moisture retention throughout the day for an incredibly comfortable finish to your shave.
Fresh + Clean Cool Wave Body Wash
Out-of-the-shower freshness that lasts. It's rich lather cleans away dirt and odor, leaving skin feeling refreshed and you feeling invigorated.


What makes Gillette Fusion® ProGlide™ better than Gillette Fusion® ?
What makes Fusion ProGlide better than Fusion is technological innovation. The razor has been reengineered and redesigned to create Gillette's Most Comfortable Shave. Gillette Fusion ProGlide shares the same core technology as Gillette Fusion ProGlide Power™: thinner, finer shaving blades, a low resistance coating and the redesigned Precision Trimmer Blade. In addition to this: Together, these technologies combine to create Gillette's Most Comfortable Shave. How does the Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ handle compare with the Gillette Fusion handle?
The Fusion ProGlide now has ergonomic side grips for better handling. How long will the Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ cartridge last?
How long a cartridge lasts varies from person to person, as it is dependent on many variables such as beard toughness and thickness, beard preparation, shaving habits, and skin sensitivity. The Gillette Fusion ProGlide's reformulated Indicator Lubrastrip™ will provide you with a visual cue - it fades to white - when optimal shave conditions have been reduced. When this happens, you may want to change your cartridge for a more comfortable shave. How was the Precision Trimmer redesigned?
The blade was improved and anti-clogging rinse slots were added. What is the Streamlined Comfort Guard with channels? What are the benefits of the Streamlined Comfort Guard?
Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ features a Streamlined Comfort Guard. The soft, flexible material surrounds the microfins, creating an outer edge that wraps around the sides of the cartridge and channels that clear away excess shave prep. This Streamlined Comfort Guard follows the contours of your face to help the shaving surface of the razor comfortably shave close. Have there been any enhancements to the lubrication strip?
Yes. It now contains more lubricants and a touch of mineral oil. Will the Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ cartridge fit any other razors on the market?
The Gillette Fusion ProGlide cartridge features a razor blade that fits on any Gillette Fusion, Fusion ProGlide or Fusion ProGlide Power™ handle. Is it better to use hot, cold, or warm water to shave?
Warm water is best for hydrating beard hair. Soaking in warm water softens hair and causes it to expand, making it 70% easier to cut. What is the best way to avoid razor burn?
If the skin is not properly prepared before shaving or if the blade on your razor is dull, you are more likely to end up with razor burn. Make sure to hydrate hair in warm water for up to three minutes and apply plenty of shave gel. Also, be sure to change the blade on your razor at the first sign of dullness or discomfort. Is it okay to let my girlfriend or wife borrow my men's razor?
For both hygiene and performance, it's not a good idea to share your razor with your partner. Women have a much larger area to shave and you may find that after only a few shaves, your blade has dulled considerably, increasing the likelihood of nicks and cuts. Tell her to try a razor specifically designed for the way a woman shaves, such as Gillette® Venus® Embrace®. Does shaving make your hair grow back thicker?
Scientists at Gillette have conducted extensive testing on the effects shaving has on both male and female hair growth, texture and color. This testing has proven that shaving does not affect hair growth, color or texture. Shaving does, however, alter the tip shape of the regrown hair, which may initially change the way hair feels as it grows back. But if hair is left to re-grow completely, it will return to its former state. In what direction should I shave to achieve the best shave?
Men's facial hair tends to grow in different directions. Start by shaving with light, gentle strokes with the grain. Then, if necessary, go against the grain for an even closer shave. What is the difference between disposable and refillable razors?
The entire shaving razor is discarded when you are through with a disposable razor. With a refillable razor, only the blade cartridge is replaced. Refillable razors like Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ and Gillette Fusion incorporate more advanced blade technology and ergonomics vs. most disposables for great control and a close comfortable shave. What is the difference between a single, double, triple and 5-blade razor? Which is best?
Gillette's research has demonstrated that single blade technology, which has been applied since 1901, is demonstrably inferior to twin blade shaving systems such as SensorExcel®, and even more so to 5-blade systems such as Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™. But the number of blades alone does not ensure a superior shave. The 5-blade shaving surface of Fusion ProGlide Power™ features progressive blade alignment, patented blade coating process and a flexible comfort guard which collectively provide Gillette's best shave. How do I avoid nicks and cuts, particularly above my upper lip?
The area above the upper lip is tricky for many men. To help avoid nicks and cuts, always leave it for last. Apply plenty of shave gel or shaving cream and allow this area to soak up as much lather as possible. When shaving, don't apply too much pressure. Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide's™ Precision Trimmer is really useful when shaving under the nose.

ProGlide Hydra Smooth™ Shave Gel
The Fusion ProGlide Hydrating formula, with Shea Butter and Glycerin, helps keep your skin hydrated during the shave and helps reduce the look and feel of shaving irritation for a smooth shave.
Thermal Scrub

Intense Cooling Lotion

What makes Gillette Fusion® ProGlide™ better than Gillette Fusion® ?
What makes Fusion ProGlide better than Fusion is technological innovation. The razor has been reengineered and redesigned to create Gillette's Most Comfortable Shave. Gillette Fusion ProGlide shares the same core technology as Gillette Fusion ProGlide Power™: thinner, finer shaving blades, a low resistance coating and the redesigned Precision Trimmer Blade. In addition to this: Together, these technologies combine to create Gillette's Most Comfortable Shave. How does the Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ handle compare with the Gillette Fusion handle?
The Fusion ProGlide now has ergonomic side grips for better handling. How long will the Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ cartridge last?
How long a cartridge lasts varies from person to person, as it is dependent on many variables such as beard toughness and thickness, beard preparation, shaving habits, and skin sensitivity. The Gillette Fusion ProGlide's reformulated Indicator Lubrastrip™ will provide you with a visual cue - it fades to white - when optimal shave conditions have been reduced. When this happens, you may want to change your cartridge for a more comfortable shave. How was the Precision Trimmer redesigned?
The blade was improved and anti-clogging rinse slots were added. What is the Streamlined Comfort Guard with channels? What are the benefits of the Streamlined Comfort Guard?
Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ features a Streamlined Comfort Guard. The soft, flexible material surrounds the microfins, creating an outer edge that wraps around the sides of the cartridge and channels that clear away excess shave prep. This Streamlined Comfort Guard follows the contours of your face to help the shaving surface of the razor comfortably shave close. Have there been any enhancements to the lubrication strip?
Yes. It now contains more lubricants and a touch of mineral oil. Will the Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ cartridge fit any other razors on the market?
The Gillette Fusion ProGlide cartridge features a razor blade that fits on any Gillette Fusion, Fusion ProGlide or Fusion ProGlide Power™ handle. Is it better to use hot, cold, or warm water to shave?
Warm water is best for hydrating beard hair. Soaking in warm water softens hair and causes it to expand, making it 70% easier to cut. What is the best way to avoid razor burn?
If the skin is not properly prepared before shaving or if the blade on your razor is dull, you are more likely to end up with razor burn. Make sure to hydrate hair in warm water for up to three minutes and apply plenty of shave gel. Also, be sure to change the blade on your razor at the first sign of dullness or discomfort. Is it okay to let my girlfriend or wife borrow my men's razor?
For both hygiene and performance, it's not a good idea to share your razor with your partner. Women have a much larger area to shave and you may find that after only a few shaves, your blade has dulled considerably, increasing the likelihood of nicks and cuts. Tell her to try a razor specifically designed for the way a woman shaves, such as Gillette® Venus® Embrace®. Does shaving make your hair grow back thicker?
Scientists at Gillette have conducted extensive testing on the effects shaving has on both male and female hair growth, texture and color. This testing has proven that shaving does not affect hair growth, color or texture. Shaving does, however, alter the tip shape of the regrown hair, which may initially change the way hair feels as it grows back. But if hair is left to re-grow completely, it will return to its former state. In what direction should I shave to achieve the best shave?
Men's facial hair tends to grow in different directions. Start by shaving with light, gentle strokes with the grain. Then, if necessary, go against the grain for an even closer shave. What is the difference between disposable and refillable razors?
The entire shaving razor is discarded when you are through with a disposable razor. With a refillable razor, only the blade cartridge is replaced. Refillable razors like Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ and Gillette Fusion incorporate more advanced blade technology and ergonomics vs. most disposables for great control and a close comfortable shave. What is the difference between a single, double, triple and 5-blade razor? Which is best?
Gillette's research has demonstrated that single blade technology, which has been applied since 1901, is demonstrably inferior to twin blade shaving systems such as SensorExcel®, and even more so to 5-blade systems such as Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™. But the number of blades alone does not ensure a superior shave. The 5-blade shaving surface of Fusion ProGlide Power™ features progressive blade alignment, patented blade coating process and a flexible comfort guard which collectively provide Gillette's best shave. How do I avoid nicks and cuts, particularly above my upper lip?
The area above the upper lip is tricky for many men. To help avoid nicks and cuts, always leave it for last. Apply plenty of shave gel or shaving cream and allow this area to soak up as much lather as possible. When shaving, don't apply too much pressure. Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide's™ Precision Trimmer is really useful when shaving under the nose.

review_text: I have incredibly sensitive skin, and a VERY course beard. I found that if I want a consistently clean shave, I have to use an electric razor. If I use a blade more than once every 5 days, my skin bleeds and I get irritation galore. However, there is a zen feeling when wet shaving. Because of this, I never stop looking for the best wet system and I found the best part of it. I have tried the double bladed razors, Mach 3 (turbo) and the Fusion, and this blows all of them away. I can shave once every 3 days or so with and against the grain with NO pain or bleeding. I always get a consistently smooth shave when I use it, and I highly recommend using this along with itNeutrogena Men Skin Clearing Shave Cream, 5.1 Ounce (Pack of 4) Not the 4 pack specifically, but the cream in general. Overall, the best razor I've used so far.

The blade was improved and anti-clogging rinse slots were added. What is the Streamlined Comfort Guard with channels? What are the benefits of the Streamlined Comfort Guard?
Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ features a Streamlined Comfort Guard. The soft, flexible material surrounds the microfins, creating an outer edge that wraps around the sides of the cartridge and channels that clear away excess shave prep. This Streamlined Comfort Guard follows the contours of your face to help the shaving surface of the razor comfortably shave close. Have there been any enhancements to the lubrication strip?
Yes. It now contains more lubricants and a touch of mineral oil. Will the Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ cartridge fit any other razors on the market?
The Gillette Fusion ProGlide cartridge features a razor blade that fits on any Gillette Fusion, Fusion ProGlide or Fusion ProGlide Power™ handle. Is it better to use hot, cold, or warm water to shave?
Warm water is best for hydrating beard hair. Soaking in warm water softens hair and causes it to expand, making it 70% easier to cut. What is the best way to avoid razor burn?
If the skin is not properly prepared before shaving or if the blade on your razor is dull, you are more likely to end up with razor burn. Make sure to hydrate hair in warm water for up to three minutes and apply plenty of shave gel. Also, be sure to change the blade on your razor at the first sign of dullness or discomfort. Is it okay to let my girlfriend or wife borrow my men's razor?
For both hygiene and performance, it's not a good idea to share your razor with your partner. Women have a much larger area to shave and you may find that after only a few shaves, your blade has dulled considerably, increasing the likelihood of nicks and cuts. Tell her to try a razor specifically designed for the way a woman shaves, such as Gillette® Venus® Embrace®. Does shaving make your hair grow back thicker?
Scientists at Gillette have conducted extensive testing on the effects shaving has on both male and female hair growth, texture and color. This testing has proven that shaving does not affect hair growth, color or texture. Shaving does, however, alter the tip shape of the regrown hair, which may initially change the way hair feels as it grows back. But if hair is left to re-grow completely, it will return to its former state. In what direction should I shave to achieve the best shave?
Men's facial hair tends to grow in different directions. Start by shaving with light, gentle strokes with the grain. Then, if necessary, go against the grain for an even closer shave. What is the difference between disposable and refillable razors?
The entire shaving razor is discarded when you are through with a disposable razor. With a refillable razor, only the blade cartridge is replaced. Refillable razors like Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ and Gillette Fusion incorporate more advanced blade technology and ergonomics vs. most disposables for great control and a close comfortable shave. What is the difference between a single, double, triple and 5-blade razor? Which is best?
Gillette's research has demonstrated that single blade technology, which has been applied since 1901, is demonstrably inferior to twin blade shaving systems such as SensorExcel®, and even more so to 5-blade systems such as Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™. But the number of blades alone does not ensure a superior shave. The 5-blade shaving surface of Fusion ProGlide Power™ features progressive blade alignment, patented blade coating process and a flexible comfort guard which collectively provide Gillette's best shave. How do I avoid nicks and cuts, particularly above my upper lip?
The area above the upper lip is tricky for many men. To help avoid nicks and cuts, always leave it for last. Apply plenty of shave gel or shaving cream and allow this area to soak up as much lather as possible. When shaving, don't apply too much pressure. Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide's™ Precision Trimmer is really useful when shaving under the nose.

What makes Gillette Fusion® ProGlide™ better than Gillette Fusion® ?
What makes Fusion ProGlide better than Fusion is technological innovation. The razor has been reengineered and redesigned to create Gillette's Most Comfortable Shave. Gillette Fusion ProGlide shares the same core technology as Gillette Fusion ProGlide Power™: thinner, finer shaving blades, a low resistance coating and the redesigned Precision Trimmer Blade. In addition to this: Together, these technologies combine to create Gillette's Most Comfortable Shave. How does the Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ handle compare with the Gillette Fusion handle?
The Fusion ProGlide now has ergonomic side grips for better handling. How long will the Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ cartridge last?
How long a cartridge lasts varies from person to person, as it is dependent on many variables such as beard toughness and thickness, beard preparation, shaving habits, and skin sensitivity. The Gillette Fusion ProGlide's reformulated Indicator Lubrastrip™ will provide you with a visual cue - it fades to white - when optimal shave conditions have been reduced. When this happens, you may want to change your cartridge for a more comfortable shave. How was the Precision Trimmer redesigned?
The blade was improved and anti-clogging rinse slots were added. What is the Streamlined Comfort Guard with channels? What are the benefits of the Streamlined Comfort Guard?
Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ features a Streamlined Comfort Guard. The soft, flexible material surrounds the microfins, creating an outer edge that wraps around the sides of the cartridge and channels that clear away excess shave prep. This Streamlined Comfort Guard follows the contours of your face to help the shaving surface of the razor comfortably shave close. Have there been any enhancements to the lubrication strip?
Yes. It now contains more lubricants and a touch of mineral oil. Will the Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ cartridge fit any other razors on the market?
The Gillette Fusion ProGlide cartridge features a razor blade that fits on any Gillette Fusion, Fusion ProGlide or Fusion ProGlide Power™ handle. Is it better to use hot, cold, or warm water to shave?
Warm water is best for hydrating beard hair. Soaking in warm water softens hair and causes it to expand, making it 70% easier to cut. What is the best way to avoid razor burn?
If the skin is not properly prepared before shaving or if the blade on your razor is dull, you are more likely to end up with razor burn. Make sure to hydrate hair in warm water for up to three minutes and apply plenty of shave gel. Also, be sure to change the blade on your razor at the first sign of dullness or discomfort. Is it okay to let my girlfriend or wife borrow my men's razor?
For both hygiene and performance, it's not a good idea to share your razor with your partner. Women have a much larger area to shave and you may find that after only a few shaves, your blade has dulled considerably, increasing the likelihood of nicks and cuts. Tell her to try a razor specifically designed for the way a woman shaves, such as Gillette® Venus® Embrace®. Does shaving make your hair grow back thicker?
Scientists at Gillette have conducted extensive testing on the effects shaving has on both male and female hair growth, texture and color. This testing has proven that shaving does not affect hair growth, color or texture. Shaving does, however, alter the tip shape of the regrown hair, which may initially change the way hair feels as it grows back. But if hair is left to re-grow completely, it will return to its former state. In what direction should I shave to achieve the best shave?
Men's facial hair tends to grow in different directions. Start by shaving with light, gentle strokes with the grain. Then, if necessary, go against the grain for an even closer shave. What is the difference between disposable and refillable razors?
The entire shaving razor is discarded when you are through with a disposable razor. With a refillable razor, only the blade cartridge is replaced. Refillable razors like Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™ and Gillette Fusion incorporate more advanced blade technology and ergonomics vs. most disposables for great control and a close comfortable shave. What is the difference between a single, double, triple and 5-blade razor? Which is best?
Gillette's research has demonstrated that single blade technology, which has been applied since 1901, is demonstrably inferior to twin blade shaving systems such as SensorExcel®, and even more so to 5-blade systems such as Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide™. But the number of blades alone does not ensure a superior shave. The 5-blade shaving surface of Fusion ProGlide Power™ features progressive blade alignment, patented blade coating process and a flexible comfort guard which collectively provide Gillette's best shave. How do I avoid nicks and cuts, particularly above my upper lip?
The area above the upper lip is tricky for many men. To help avoid nicks and cuts, always leave it for last. Apply plenty of shave gel or shaving cream and allow this area to soak up as much lather as possible. When shaving, don't apply too much pressure. Gillette® Fusion® ProGlide's™ Precision Trimmer is really useful when shaving under the nose.

review_text: If you're a man with ingrown hair trouble, consider this cream. It's more expensive than the basic cream you'd buy in the Walmart shaving section, but it's worth it. I tried every "rash free" or "fragrance free" or "bump preventing" type of shave cream for more than 20 years, with limited success. I was recommended the Coochy shave cream by the owner of the kind of shop that sells stuff to strippers. Of course I was skeptical, but I have to say, that guy was right. I use it to shave my face, and I've had a 98% reduction in the frequency of bumps and ingrown hairs along my jaw and on my neck. I hope they never stop making this stuff.

My hair never feels weighed down just clean and light. I recommend using the entire line of Hair Rules products, in my opinion the all natural conditioner also plays a big role in how your hair turns out.

review_text: I did the BC about 3 months ago and my hair type all over appears to be a 4C and NAPPY!It's very coarse and coily. I couldn't get much of a curl definition without putting a lot gel or activator in my hair (which made for a lot of product buildup). I saw this product on YouTube and saw someone demonstrate getting curl definition with DRY hair.(Not what the product called for). I used the product both ways but made sure I put some sort of oil and leave-in conditioner on it first and still got great deinition. The cost is somewhat expensive but worth it until my hair grows longer so that I can manipulate it more.

review_summary: Overpriced and of diminished manufacturing quality than before.
review_text: A bit overpriced for the fact that I'm actually using 2 razors to shave ALL of the hair off my face and head. That's not really the point of buying a razor, and unfortunately the varying quality of electric shavers ensures that you'll be experimenting forever. That really sucks, I say. Here, I'm cutting hair with the new razor, it is not cutting short enough, so I'm cleaning it all up with the previous razor I had. It does cut hair, but the additional pieces are useless in this case as I'm referring to cutting hair without any pieces attached. So, what do we have here? A 10 piece haircut set by Wahl, a company that is generally reputed for its haircutting kits. The set is only partially effective, and requires additional shaves to complete. So, A) you wouldn't see it used in a barber shop, B) effectiveness is cut in half by quality. I hate doing this, because I have bought Wahl in the past, but this particular razor is of diminished quality than what had been manufactured before. I bought this razor because the original razor I had was not cutting short enough anymore, but now that razor is effectively being used to do the job of the new razor, which does not cut hair short enough. Pretty par for the course regarding products I've bought in this decade. Not sure what the hell is going on out there, but this decade has seen a stark downturn in the amount of flawed products on the general market. I pine for the 90s and 00s, when I had no problem buying something that worked well (the 80s were defined by places like Radio Shack and therefore on par with what is occurring today.) Back in the early 90s, I had a razor that lasted several years; All cuts were low enough, and all use was consistent. Can't say it's like that today, anywhere you turn, regarding ANY products (the last CD I bought was a manufacturing horror story that I never could have ever foreseen in, say, 1991, and the CD I bought before that exploded in my player and broke into over 500 pieces.) However, I still have CDs that I bought from the grunge/Pearl Jam/Nirvana era that are still in perfect condition and still going strong. What gives?

review_text: Made for your beard
product_title: Simco Hair Fixer 500Ml
product_description: PRODUCT INFORMATION What does a mans beard have to do with the downturn? Everything, if you run Simla Chemicals (Simco), a company known globally for the hair fixers it manufactures. Simcos history began before Independence with Sardar Pratap Singh Bagga, a sturdy Sikh with a long, flowing beard, learning lessons on chemicals in the famous Lahore perfumery Bhaion ki Dukaan (the shop of brothers). With time, Bagga moved to Shimla and set up his own business in 1948. Four years later, he chose to give up a comfortable life and moved to Delhi. He felt the market here was penetrable, son Kuldeep Singh Bagga, 62, recounts. Although the enterprising Bagga rarely used a beard fixer in his life, he was quick to realise that other men in his community could not do without a glue to keep their untrimmed facial hair integral to the Sikh identity in place. Sixty-seven years later, Simco, short for Shimla Chemicals, has not only penetrated the market but has become a virtual synonym for all beard fixers. Today, the firm boasts of a customer base of 1 million spread across India and 12 countries including the US, the UK, Canada and Australia. PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Net Wt. 17 fl.oz (500ml) Product of India Packaging: Plastic Product Type: Hair Fixer (Straigtner)

Simcos history began before Independence with Sardar Pratap Singh Bagga, a sturdy Sikh with a long, flowing beard, learning lessons on chemicals in the famous Lahore perfumery Bhaion ki Dukaan (the shop of brothers). With time, Bagga moved to Shimla and set up his own business in 1948. Four years later, he chose to give up a comfortable life and moved to Delhi. He felt the market here was penetrable, son Kuldeep Singh Bagga, 62, recounts. Although the enterprising Bagga rarely used a beard fixer in his life, he was quick to realise that other men in his community could not do without a glue to keep their untrimmed facial hair integral to the Sikh identity in place. Sixty-seven years later, Simco, short for Shimla Chemicals, has not only penetrated the market but has become a virtual synonym for all beard fixers. Today, the firm boasts of a customer base of 1 million spread across India and 12 countries including the US, the UK, Canada and Australia. PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Net Wt. 17 fl.oz (500ml) Product of India Packaging: Plastic Product Type: Hair Fixer (Straigtner)

review_text: This is such a high-quality body wash. It smells amazing - citrus and berries, kind-of like wine. It is beautiful in the bottle, too, pearlescent and pink. But the best part is that it really nourishes your skin! I have dry skin on my arms (especially in winter) and this helps keep it moisturized and smooth. I know it's expensive, but it's a versatile product and while the scent lasts, it's not overwhelming. I love it!

review_summary: If this is not in my shower, I miss it!
review_text: I received a sample of this product. I had received samples of other Philosophy products and though I had used them I had never ordered them in their full sizes before this one. This product was different. I looked forward to using it every time. It's a silly thing but seeing this in my shower in the morning makes me smile. The scent is not strong but it is a light floral with some citrus. Think baby powder and lemonade. Yummy! It keeps my skin soft, makes nice suds, is mild and it can also be used as shampoo but I don't prefer it for that. When I start to run out - I'll order more. I wish the bottle were not so big around because I have small hands and I've dropped it a few times. The bottle came through each drop without breaking or splitting or spilling, though.

review_text: Love, love, love this shampoo & conditioner! I've been using the Royal Moroccan Shampoo & Conditioner for about nine months now and I find that my color lasts so much longer than it used to. It's concentrated so a little goes a long way - - I use two pumps each for shampoo & conditioner - - so they both run out at the same time and I'm not left with a partial bottle of either one when one runs out! This size bottle usually lasts me about three months. If you color your hair, I would definitely recommend trying this brand.

review_text: It arrived a little early which was great. I don't know if anyone else is the same, but at the very top of the wig, where all the strands start, you can see a brown piece of fabric of where it all comes together. I have to either wear a hat, or make sure I have a head band that'll cover the top of the wig. That is the only complaint. Other than that, it's quite thick and it feels like it was made well. I love the color. The blue was a little brighter than I thought, but not by much. I love how thick it is. People actually think it's my real hair! I wish they made a red one just like this.

review_text: I'm not sure it's that helpful on covering gray, maybe if you only have a few short hairs here and there. Maybe it just takes longer. review_summary: Wake up and smell the coffee!
review_text: This is a wonderful, natural conditioner and great accompaniment to their shampoo. The smell is amazing and despite the small bottle, it lasts for quite a long time. The small bottle is actually nice for me being a guy on the move all the time because it's easy to pack and takes up very little space. I have short, light brown hair and I use it as leave in conditioner. I wait until my hair dries and I rub it in, then let it dry and finger style. Too easy! It's great and it does darken my blonde highlights a bit which is nice since it makes my hair more evenly brown.

review_text: Just finished using this dye. I have been looking for a permanent purple hair dye for some time, as most available are semi-perm. I love the shade on the box and my light brown hair promised to be lovely and vibrant. After applying, washing and drying I have to say the color is closer to black than purple. Like in the comics when a character has black hair, so the sheen is colored blue- That's how the result it- purple sheen over black. I will not be running out to cover it up, and I hope it fades to a more fun color, but in the meantime, I won't be purchasing again.

review_text: Ok so i was pretty hesitant in buying this. i knew i wanted a purple violet tone but nothing bright. this color only works on brown hair. probably best if you have light brown hair. which is awesome because you don't have to bleach your hair. My hair is naturally light golden brown and it just really took the color so well. the color doesn't look as purple as the box. it has more of a violet or pinker undertone. but in my opinion it looks way better than the color shown on the box. if you want a unique dark hair color but tired of brown or black, this color is awesome! I don't know how long the color will hold up. I think i will post another review after a few weeks.

product_title: Odor Assassin Air & Fabric Odor Eliminator Spring Rain Scent - 32 Oz Spray Bottle (1)
product_description: DIRECTIONS FOR USE Apply Odor Assassin Air & Fabric Odor Eliminator through included mist type sprayer for best results. For Air: Spray rooms as needed. Eliminates odors in seconds. For Carpet & Upholstery: Test on inconspicuous area first. Spray evenly until slightly damp. Odors are eliminated as surfaces dry. Use caution spraying silk or fabrics affected by water. Can also be added to carpet shampoo or extraction solution (4-6 oz per gallon of water). For Leather: Test on inconspicuous area first. Spray on to soft cloth and wipe the leather. Allow to dry thoroughly. For Vehicles: Spray carpet and upholstery as noted above. Turn air conditioner to re-circulate. Spray under dash in area of air intake to eliminate odors in vents. KEEP THIS AND ALL CLEANING PRODUCTS OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN CAUTION: Not for personal use. Use only as instructed. Avoid contact with eyes and skin. If sprayed on sensitive skin or in eyes, flush thoroughly with water at least 15 minutes. If ingested, dilute with water. Deliberately concentrating vapors may be irritating to respiratory system. Contains water, surfactants, fragrance, and a patented odor neutralizer.

review_summary: Love this -- just on the ends
review_text: I love this product and my local store no longer carries it--thankfully we have Amazon. I had to buy a 12 pack which will last me 6 years. I use this just on the ends of my hair. I like to blow dry for body but then the ends are too "fluffy". This sort of smoothes them together. Kind of like what would happen if you got the ends a bit damp. It does not make clumps. It also adds shine. If you have really dry hair it would be good all over. The product is oily and I have to wash my hands after applying. I use it after I blow dry. Has a light scent but unless you are super sensitive I doubt it would bother you. It does not last all day

review_text: I bought this product online becasue I couldn't find it anywhere in stores (like Indian or Persian markets) that would usually sell henna. I was surprised that it arrived within 2 days, so if I had started out to buy it online, it would have saved me all the running around to try to find it. So I will buy it from Amazon next time too. Becasue it is the largest size package available, I do think it is a good value. I haven't tried any other brands of Cassia to compare them yet, but I have tried other types and colors of hennas, though technically Cassia isn't henna. Since it is still a plant used for hair treatments, it seems a lot like hennas, (the blacks and the reds are very different in texture) but it does not have the same strong plant fragrance. For now, I do like this product and intend to continue with it. I do recommend it to others who are looking for a more natural conditioning treatment that won't really change the hair color much. If used with a little rhubarb root and a little brown henna it will leave light hair with a sort of golden hue...if you don't keep it in for longer than 1/2 hour. Hope this helps.

product_title: Cake Beauty Satin Sugar Mini Hair & Body Refreshing Powder for Darker Hues, 0.7 oz
product_description: Cake Beauty Satin Sugar Refreshing Body and Hair Powder for Darker Hues is an award winning, best selling hair and body refreshing powder that you'll love in more ways than one. As part of the Satin Sugar Collection, this treatment was designed to be multi-purpose and perfect for the girl on the go! This cocoa colored hair powder is ideal for beauty queens with red, black and brown hair (or any hue in between!). Just fluff the lightly pigmented formula on even the lightest of skin without leaving any color behind! It is the ultimate double duty recipe for looking spectacular without the fuss. Indulge in time-saving goodness! Cake girls say that it smells like baked lemon sugar ... xox. To use in hair, sprinkle this velvety powder into your hands and run through your hair to refresh, renew and add volume between washings concentrating on root areas. Excess oil is absorbed leaving your tresses feeling fresh and fabulous, just like you! To use on body, sprinkle all over your body and rub in this luxurious blend that leaves you smelling fresh, feeling clean and looking perfectly polished. Formulated with: calendula, chamomile, corn starch. Formulated without: talc, parabens, phthalates, gmo, sulfates, triclosan or petrochemicals.

review_text: But WRONG PHOTO. Note that the description doesn't match the label. It seems you will actually receive the smaller "travel" size (which is cheaper elsewhere). However, this is an awesome product. I've been using it for years. Smells sweet and delicious, but not overpowering. Adds a little texture and volume to clean hair, and refreshes hair that's due for a wash. Be sure to select the appropriate shade for your hair. This is the one I use and I have medium brown/auburn hair, with some lighter highlights. Application tip: Sprinkle it into your HANDS first, flip your head upside down, and then apply. This prevents visible powder along your scalp.

review_text: I spent around $10.00 dollars on these five little keychain-like coils because I was promised they would be gentle and would refrain from getting caught in my hair when removing. These Spring Bands are actually rougher on my hair than your standard Goody Ouchless elastics. I have thick, coily, African-American hair. Perhaps the product is not intended for me, but I simply don't see why I paid $10.00 to lose more hair. That said, the saving grace about these is that they are very gentle on my edges while in. Meaning, there isn't a lot of tension caused by the bands. I am very protective of my edges and it is difficult to find a product for thick hair that isn't too tight. However, overall, I feel like I wasted my money and would not recommend this product to other African American, thick, coilies. If you have thinner or straighter hair, this may be of use. Otherwise, save yourself some hair and pain and go for the cheap elastics.

review_text: Moroccan Mud makes my hair look as full as any volumIzing shampoo I have ever used. It allows my hair to go about twice as long between washes before looking dirty. After about a month of use, it has taken away the yellow sheen from my natural salt and pepper color. And the Menthe Tea gives my scalp a delightful tingling sensation. If you don't want the tingle, go with the Clementine. Mud shampoo does not give my hair that wet squeaky clean feel, but because of the benefits I can do without this. I would suggest that you wash your hair, rinse it and wash again. There is no need for conditioner. It is a bit expensive; consider it a luxury item that you sorely deserve!

review_text: I've been using clay shampoo for 3 weeks when I decided to try this one. I wanted to like it because it can be easily and quickly ordered through prime but it was a huge disappointment. It left my hair waxy and sticky. Luckily, I didn't need to leave the house on both occasions I used it because I looked horrible. The second time I even added some pure bentonite clay mixed with water to add more cleaning power but my hair was still waxy. As I said, I've been using mud poo before so it wasn't a case of my hair needing to detox or get used to the product. Both the other brand I tried and my home made version left my hair clean and bouncy. Also, it didn't come with any sort of detailed instructions of what to expect and how to detox if that was your first time using this type of product. And that is a crucial step, as it takes a week or two and many washes to get good results. If you decide to try this product anyway, please first read up on hair detox. But given the steep price and poor results, I would not recommend this product.

review_summary: My daughters and I LOVE these hair ties!!
review_text: We love our Hair Ties from Kenz Laurenz! I have 3 girls with long hair and I do as well. We live in Texas and it's hot so we all typically wear our hair in pony-tails for a good portion of the year. Our other old hair ties were always pulling out hair and hard to wrap around one of my daughters super thick hair. These are perfect! They don't pull out hair and are easy to use.. For the most part creases are minimal, but that doesn't bother me. I love that they are soft. They are Easy to put on my arm if I am not ready to put my hair up and want to wait til I get hot. I have twin 10 year old girls and an 11 year old girl and they all like the different colors. I have ordered my 3rd set of them!! Thank you for these awesome hair ties! I'm sure I will order more as they tend to get left in gym bags and purses and things and it's always good to have lots on hand! Thank you!

review_text: Purchased this wig for a theater production- was a little worried about it looking super fake on stage, but I have to say, with a little work, this wig is shockingly convincing. For the price, I couldn't be happier! I would definitely recommend blending the roots at the part on top for a more natural look (I used a cream make up applied with a highlighting brush) and I personally prefer it straight rather than curved, but all in all, very happy!
product_title: Liz Wig Heat Friendly Medium Long Straight Monofilament Lolita Princess Cosplay Party Hair Wig 17" 43cm (Brown w/ Gold Highlights)
product_description:
SPECIFICATIONS:

Color: Brown w/ Gold Highlights
Cap Size: Capless
Type: Synthetic Wig
Length: 43cm / 17" Long
Material: 100% Heat Friendly Resistant Heat Friendly Synthetic Fiber
Heat Resistant Temperature: 150 c / 302 f

DESCRIPTION:
Perfectly compliment your features with monofilament top hair wig by Liz Wig. It has been a top seller year after year and will continue to impress. This cutely cut monofilament top style is cool, comfortable, and cap less. Pointed ends allow for the most natural movement and flow.

SPECIAL FEATURES:
Capless Construction cool, comfortable and light weighted
Monofilament Top - Creates the illusion of natural hair growth where the hair is parted and allows you to part the hair in any direction.
Adjustable Pull Straps - allows you to loosen or tighten the cap up to a half inch
Eartabs - make sure wig not point away from the face,makes it smooth and conceals the hair and hair line.

review_text: I purchased this clip to match my prom dress. review_summary: Feels great on the scalp after chemical treatments!
review_text: I bought this at my local health food grocery store. I'm a Caucasian with bleached blonde hair at the roots. I bought this because I didn't read the label and thought it was plain conditioner. So then I tried to put some in a spray bottle with water and spray in as leave-in conditioner sometimes. It worked ok. Also later I noticed that the ingredients contained comfrey, which have super-skin-healing powers. Anyway, when I used to have my hair done at salons, it would either burn during application and itch later, or just itch later. The "bleach itch" on my scalp usually lasted 2-3 days afterwards. And it made me wonder if a little bit of damage was still being done to my scalp. Since I now bleach my roots at home and with better more expensive bleach than salons use, and I'm trying to fix past damage from salons, one day after bleaching I had the idea to spray some of this on my scalp all over. Wow - it felt good! I left it on all day and slept with it. I never got any bleach itch it all, so now I do that every time. And the ingredients seemed to bring the pH back to normal right away, since bleach offsets the pH balance. This would probably feel equally as good on the scalp, after someone uses relaxer. Also, I use this as plain conditioner in the shower, and it works really well for that purpose. It seemed to work better as conditioner, than the same product in this line in the squeeze tube that is actually labeled as conditioner. The only caveat I have is that maybe, but I can't tell, the herbal extracts in the ingredients might have been tinging my blonde hair goldish orange when used as a conditioner, so I had to stop using it for that purpose. But I still spray it on my roots after chemical processes.

review_text: I just bought a bottle of this from Whole Foods. I noticed that the Alaffia people have added phenoxyethanol to this product. It did not used to be in curl reviving tonic. I am surprised and disappointed that they put it in. It is known to be toxic. I wrote the company and told them my feelings about this. If many people would complain, they would probably take it out. See the following for a commentary. Phenoxyethanol is a glycol ether. Glycols are a series of chemicals that find their way into all sorts of things: paint, lacquer, jet fuel..... Phenoxyethanol is used as an anti-bacterial in cosmetics as well as a stabilizer in perfume. The product's Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) says that it phenoxyethanol is harmful if swallowed, inhaled or absorbed through the skin and that it can cause reproductive damage. The MSDS refers to 100% concentrations, so is it safe at lower doses? In cosmetics the concentrations are typically 0.5% to 1%. There are several animal studies that demonstrate that it is toxic - with effects on the brain and the nervous system - at moderate concentrations. In Japan, there is a concentration limit for its use in cosmetics. In Europe, the European Union classifies it as an irritant and there are various studies (on rabbit skin, for example) that demonstrate reactions at low doses. The EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) data sheets show chromosomal changes and genetic mutation effects in testing as well as testicular atrophy and interference with reproductivity in mice. I also came across a report written by a medical professional who contracted allergies after coming into contact with phenoxyethanol in a detergent used for cleaning lab equipment. It seems he wasn't a fluke. There are over 3,000 known allergans and they were studied, along with the data from 9,948 patients, by a research team in Germany. Phenoxyethanol was in the top 10. An Italian study also determined that phenoxyethanol is a contact allergan. However, a 1990 article in the Journal of the American College of Toxicology said that it was only a mild irritant to rabbit skin at 2%. Concern that phenoxyethanol is a neurotoxin precedes the FDA. German research in 1999, concluded that it had neurotoxin potential. Phenoxyethanol breaks down to phenol and acetaldehyde, acetaldehyde converts to acetate. Phenol can disable the immune system's primary response mechanism. Given that, it is at best ironic, that phenoxyethanol is used as an anti-bacterial in vaccines. Acetaldehyde occurs during the breakdown of ethanol, (alchohol and 2-phenoxyETHANOL), it is a suspected carcinogen. Inhalation studies have shown irritation of the eyes, skin, and respiratory tract.

review_summary: The cap is super tight, and I have a small head
review_text: The cap is super tight, and I have a small head. I have shoulder length hair, so it's not because my hair is super long. The opening is 4 1/2 inches before it's stretched. Also, the fabric around the opening wicks moisture inside the cap, because it is fabric and not plastic, so the inside of the cap ended up being wet. The other downer was that it shipped from China and you don't know that until you place your order, so it took several weeks to arrive in the mail. I would not order this again. It wasn't worth the money I saved.

Lilac Betty can be easily removed from skin with a warm soapy washcloth. To avoid staining follow instructions using petroleum jelly. It will not rub off the hair, even perspiration and activity will not remove Betty Color. Betty can be used as frequently as you like, some of our customers try a vibrant specialty color for the weekend, and then use a natural color like black or brown to change back to their original color. Each kit has one application of hair color,tray,application wand, a mixing spatula, gloves and easy- to-follow instructions. 1 Box is good for 1-2 applications. Made In The USA.

review_summary: PERFECT HOLD AND CURL WITH LESS STICKINESS
review_text: If you want a little more flexibility and less stickiness, try this: first, (for long hair) use two pumps of Wella EMI volume mousse (level 3 out of 4). This is VERY CLEAN volumizing mousse but it doesn't give the hold of AG.Put that through hair THEN, ADD 3 pumps of AG mousse gel. PERFECT HOLD AND CURL WITH LESS STICKINESS. Been doing this for a year now and it's been good. If the weather is REALLY humid, I only use one pump of the EMI and the rest AG. It's like mixing gels. Mix a strong gel with a little bit of lighter hold gel and it helps with the stickiness factor without compromising hold. I used to use L'Oreal Lasting Curls gel but they stopped making it and I cannot find ANY other gel that works like that one did. I started using mousse but got the same stiff, sticky, tacky, frizzy crap until I used the EMI (which was SUPER CLEAN but didn't give enough volume/hold) so I added the AG mousse gel and BINGO!

product_description: Good personal hygiene is the first step to good health. While it is an important part of one's daily life, personal hygiene isn't just about having bouncy hair, clear skin and shiny, white teeth. For women, it's also about taking care of the hygiene of their most intimate area - the vagina. Ironically, this is the one area that's often neglected the most. Everyone feels they are doing just fine when it comes to intimate hygiene. It's this sense of misplaced confidence that makes them think that all the talk about intimate hygiene is not for them. Not only do they believe they are safe from irritation, itching, pain, odour, white discharge and infection, they also take a lot of myths about vaginal hygiene for facts

review_text: I notice this product getting compromised. I have used K+S men's hair conditioner for a number of years now. With the last three orders, the conditioner does not seem to have the thickness, the robustness, smell or flair that I had gotten used to. Something seems missing. You drop it once, you broke it. Love to go back to what and how you were before. Will give it one more try; if things do not improve, will switch.

review_summary: This wig is just like the photo and as described!
review_text: This wig is very beautiful and exactly as described. I love wigs and often wear them for fun or for a quick hairstyle. This wig is exactly as described! The color is a beautiful dark neon purple like the photos and the top is a rich jet black. Kanekalon fiber makes the wig very soft and have a natural shine to it. The curls are very soft and loose as described. The wig doesn't need much maintance but a soft brush and a really wide tooth comb. Due to the fact that the curls are so soft and loose it can get easily frizzy at the ends so I just finger comb the bottom and it fixes it up. The wig fits very well and is held buy two latches at the back. I don't style my wigs and usually buy as is so I am not sure about styling but I think it is already beautiful and doesn't need much fixing throughout the day. review_text: Both of these products are phenomenal! Hair mask: I have never used a hair mask that was this thick before. I worked it through my hair and left it in for a bit while sitting in a sauna. When I rinsed it my hair was amazingly soft and silky. Leave in conditioner: I worked this through my damp hair after using the hair mask, and it kept my hair from being too frizzy and kept it soft and smooth. How To Wash?
1.Detangle:Gently remove tangles using a wide tooth comb,working gradually from the ends to the base.
2.Wash:Fill your sink with enough cool water to submerge your wig.Mix in a small amount of Shampoo for synthetic hair.Soak your wig for 3-5 minutes. Gently swirl without rubbing.

4.Dry&Condition:Place on a folding wig stand,spray with a Leave-in Conditioner,and allow to air dry.DO NOT WRING OR SQUEEZE.
5.Style:Once dry,style as usual.Use your fingers or a wide tooth comb to style your synthetic wig.Define layers with Synthetic-Safe styling products.

Product Details:Lolita Clip on Ponytails Cosplay Wigs
- Cap Size: One size fits most
- Wig Material:Synthetic High Temp Fiber
Product Included:1*wig+1*free wig cap
Please Kindly Note:
* Photos as shown are modeling after styled
* that color might look slightly different in person due to camera quality and monitor settings.Stock photos are taken in natural light with no flash.
How To Wash?
1.Detangle:Gently remove tangles using a wide tooth comb,working gradually from the ends to the base.
2.Wash:Fill your sink with enough cool water to submerge your wig.Mix in a small amount of Shampoo for synthetic hair.Soak your wig for 3-5 minutes. Gently swirl without rubbing.
3.Rinse:Rinse with cool water to remove shampoo.Gently press with a towel to remove excess water. DO NOT RUB OR WRING.
4.Dry&Condition:Place on a folding wig stand,spray with a Leave-in Conditioner,and allow to air dry.DO NOT WRING OR SQUEEZE.
5.Style:Once dry,style as usual.Use your fingers or a wide tooth comb to style your synthetic wig.Define layers with Synthetic-Safe styling products.

review_summary: Best anti-inflammatory that I have ever used.
review_text: I use this by saturating a cloth pad, wrapping plastic around to prevent staining things, and then using an ace bandage to keep it in place. Then I sleep with it in place, allowing skin to absorb as it will for that time (warmly, with usual blankets). Most recently, I used it for a knee that swelled painfully such that I had trouble walking. This is a unique oil that is a powerful anti-inflammatory. It brought down swelling more in 2 hours than ice, rest, wraps, & meds did with 4 weeks of fruitless efforts. So, the unique molecules in this oil are evidently what my body needs. I'll continue to use it daily until there are no signs of inflammation, anywhere, and then switch to maintenance with it. Some times old-time remedies are best! It is just easy to forget about them.

Our custom blend of natural botanicals is infused with Wheatgrass Proteins to remove chlorine, minerals and oil build-up on hair and scalp. Nettle, Aloe and Rose Hip Extracts rebalance and hydrate hair. Instructions: Apply a small amount of the Peter Lamas Age-Defying Wheatgrass Purifying Shampoo to wet hair and scalp. Work into a rich lather, then rinse thoroughly. Follow with Peter Lamas Age-Defying Wheatgrass Purifying Conditioner. Apply a small amount of the Peter Lamas Naturals Wheatgrass Purifying Conditioner to damp hair after shampooing. Massage through lightly, then rinse. For extra conditioning, wait 3-5 minutes before rinsing.

product_title: NOW Solutions Organic Jojoba Essential Oil, 4-Ounce
product_description: Condition: In need of healthier hair, softer skin, or an oil for general bath care and massage. Solution: 100% Pure. Certified Organic Jojoba Oil is derived from the seed of the jojoba (Simmondsia chinensis) shrub and is arguably one of the most popular cosmetic oils available today. Its high stability, invigorating scent and cosmetic versatility make it ideal for all skin and hair types, and it is most commonly used to promote softer hair and skin. Jojoba Oil contains many nutritional compounds, including long-chain essential fatty acids and fatty alcohols. NOW Solutions is the next step in the evolution of personal care products. This comprehensive natural line encompasses anti-aging moisturizers and serums, bath and body gels, shampoos and conditioners, oral care, skin care, and essential oils, all of which are formulated with the finest functional ingredients from around the world. NOW Solutions products avoid harsh chemicals and synthetic ingredients in all of our formulations, to provide a more natural product line.

review_summary: Great Jojoba oil, not so great cap.
review_text: This is a great Jojoba oil, and I really like the NOW Foods products, but I have a problem with the push-down cap. I had the same problem with the bottle of Sweet Almond Oil from them also. It tends to let the oil go all over the top, making an oily mess. I ended up putting it in a serum bottle, and it works well for me that way. I love the oil, and all of the NOW Foods products I have, just not the cap. Still highly recommend though!

review_text: I ordered a white 332 and a carbon 332 to cut different colors of hair. They have quickly become my favorite cutting combs. I wasn't sure if I would like the extra wide spaced teeth, but I found them to work great, especially for initial combing for guests who have come in out of the wind, for guests who perhaps don't comb their hair often--and also for those who do. Both teeth spacings hold the hair well when combing and cutting, and the spines are textured just enough for good grip during wet or dry cuts. I'm not sure why, but the carbon is much stiffer than the white. The white is still stiff enough however for cutting and styling short hair. I plan to order one or two other YS Park combs in the near future for styling and finish combing also.

product_title: Plant Therapy Tea Tree Organic Essential Oil | 100% Pure, USDA Certified Organic, Undiluted, Natural Aromatherapy, Therapeutic Grade | 100 milliliter (3.38 ounces)
product_description:
Plant Therapy Tea Tree Organic Essential Oil (INCI Ingredients: Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree, Organic) Leaf Oil

Looking for an organic antiseptic? Let Tea Tree Organic be your answer. Tea Tree Oil can aid in treating acne, dandruff, and other skin related issues. Properly diluted it can be added to your shampoo, creams, and soap with added benefit. Tea Tree Oil is a safe, natural and organic alternative to help tidy and clean your home as it acts as a natural antiseptic and antibacterial agent. It's an all-natural antiseptic surface cleaner and refresher especially in steamy, musty areas like the bathroom.

Known as Melaluca Alternifolia, our Tea Tree Oil is 100% organic and is produced by steam distilling Tea Tree leaves - a plant natively found in Australia. Add it to your arsenal to help treat skin issues, even face blemishes like acne. Create a skin-soothing salve by blending 9 drops of Tea Tree Organic and 9 drops of Lavender Organic with 2 tbsp of your favorite Plant Therapy carrier oil and apply to the areas of concern. For skin blemishes, dilute to 5% and apply directly to the blemish. It is also a powerful dandruff fighting compound that can be used to make tea tree infused shampoo for healing your scalp.

Suffering from fungal infections? Our essential oil acts as an effective anti-fungal solution that can dry up the moisture that makes fungus grow.

The Plant Therapy Difference
100% Pure and Undiluted, USDA Certified Organic, Non-GMO
Organoleptic and GC/MS Testing
Batch Codes on Every Bottle
KidSafe© Formulations

We offer a vast selection of oils and blends in a variety of sizes. The 2.5 mL, 5mL and 10 mL sizes are the perfect amount to test the waters. Our 30 mL bottle is a popular size for those that know just how well our oils work. The 100 mL value size is cost effective and easy on the budget. For ultimate convenience, try our handy Roll-Ons.

Looking for an organic antiseptic? Let Tea Tree Organic be your answer. Tea Tree Oil can aid in treating acne, dandruff, and other skin related issues. Properly diluted it can be added to your shampoo, creams, and soap with added benefit. Tea Tree Oil is a safe, natural and organic alternative to help tidy and clean your home as it acts as a natural antiseptic and antibacterial agent. It's an all-natural antiseptic surface cleaner and refresher especially in steamy, musty areas like the bathroom.

Known as Melaluca Alternifolia, our Tea Tree Oil is 100% organic and is produced by steam distilling Tea Tree leaves - a plant natively found in Australia. Add it to your arsenal to help treat skin issues, even face blemishes like acne. Create a skin-soothing salve by blending 9 drops of Tea Tree Organic and 9 drops of Lavender Organic with 2 tbsp of your favorite Plant Therapy carrier oil and apply to the areas of concern. For skin blemishes, dilute to 5% and apply directly to the blemish. It is also a powerful dandruff fighting compound that can be used to make tea tree infused shampoo for healing your scalp.

Suffering from fungal infections? Our essential oil acts as an effective anti-fungal solution that can dry up the moisture that makes fungus grow.

The Plant Therapy Difference
100% Pure and Undiluted, USDA Certified Organic, Non-GMO
Organoleptic and GC/MS Testing
Batch Codes on Every Bottle
KidSafe© Formulations

We offer a vast selection of oils and blends in a variety of sizes. The 2.5 mL, 5mL and 10 mL sizes are the perfect amount to test the waters. Our 30 mL bottle is a popular size for those that know just how well our oils work. The 100 mL value size is cost effective and easy on the budget. For ultimate convenience, try our handy Roll-Ons.

review_text: I've been usually these scarves since 2004. They made my hair grow like grass (people used to tell me). I would stock up. I'd wear them when my hair was pressed & when my hair was curly, at night. It says don't wear them when your hair is wet b/c it will take some of the treatment out of the scarf. But, I did it anyway b/c I never wanted my hair to go untreated. I would rate this as a 10 back in 2004. But about 2 years ago (2010), I noticed they started making the scarves cheaper & not putting as much of the growth product in. I could tell b/c the smell of the scarf used to be SO much stronger as soon as you took it out of the package. I even stopped using the scarf for frequently b/c I thought my hair & scalp may have gotten immune to the product in the scarf. But, I never saw results when I went back to the scarf! I would no longer recommend this product. I still use them on occassion b/c I'm so used to it at this point. (I just use it as a scarf - not necessarily for growth). I can definitely tell that the company has capitalized on the demand for hair grow products. They've decreased the amount of formula in the each scarf, in order to stretch it out, to make more money!

review_summary: A Ponytail of Woe: The Hair Tie Conspiracy Theory
review_text: They fall apart way too quickly, most on the first use. Goody brand is no better. Back in the day (90s, early 2000s) I would get a pack of 100 (Goody) and it would last 3 years; these days I'll be lucky for that same pack of 100 to last 3 months. Call me a conspiracy theorist but I think the industry got wise as to how long these things last and lowered quality standards purposely to increase profits (repeat purchases) and decrease costs (sub-standard materials and QC). I call this my "Hair Tie Conspiracy Theory" and list it among my many other irrelevant third-world problems.

review_text: I have always had very thick hair until the last few years. It started thinning. I began noticing the shower was full of hair strands after shampooing. I finally broke down & went to a dermatologist who looked at my hair roots & told me that I have Telogen Effluvium, which is basically hair loss from stress. I will never get back to normal again & it will always go through cycles of hair loss. So I have to learn to live with a widening part & very thin patches. It is devastating & depressing. I have tried thickening shampoos & sprays but really nothing helped. I saw this product in the clearance isle of Walmart & decided what the heck. It has helped tremendously! I just put it over my thin spots & shake it in a circular motion & voila, it disappears. It has helped my confidence a lot. Now there is a down fall to this. It is NOT waterproof. It will come off in the rain or if sweating. It will also come off on your hand if you touch it. I do find that a light hair spraying over it helps. So it is not the perfect answer, but it sure helps.

review_summary: like dust. What I hate most
review_text: 4stars. Works temporary but very messy. Fibers get all over floor n counter, like dust. What I hate most; fibers get inside my nose n ears. I wonder if this stuff is safe for my lungs. Each time I use, I have to blow my nose n dig my ears with Q-tip! If I use this stuff every day for the rest of my life, am I going to develope some kind of lung issue? I worry sometimes and wonder if this stuff is tested for lung issues. I've used this product for almost a year n i figured out some ways to apply n clean up that works for me: cover counter/floors before applying product, plug nose with tissue, wear less or no clothes n wash body/face after applying, use combo of small make up brush n comb to define hairline n spread access fibers evenly on head clean counters/floor using baby wipes or wet towel Cover sofa head part w towel when napping-it sheds This fiber stuff makes my hair look fuller. From afar, not noticeable at all. Close up is noticeable if not apply evenly or apply too much or in outdoor lighting. Not so much noticeable indoor lighting close up if apply evenly. Looks better if u already have some hair or thinning hair. If you're totally bald, this stuff will look like u powder your whole head. N if u accidentally scratch your head or rub your head on something, the fibers rub off, so U may need to reapply-bring a small mirror n fiber bottle if you're going to a wedding, beach, etc. Keep in mind, fibers will get everywhere when applying, as far as 5 feet from u; it can get on toilet bowl n bathtub too. N u can't see the fibers flying cause they're so small but when u wipe or clean toilet/tub, there's evidence of fibers on your wipes. N the worst part is fibers in your nose which is why I plug my nose when applying. It amazes me how far these fibers can spread n it's annoying cleaning afterwards. I recommend applying in a room with hard floors, no carpet. It's a lot of work to clean up, but if u feel confidence at the end, it's worth it, I guess. I'm going to continue to use this product until I find a better solution n I'm thinking of trying other fiber products too.

review_summary: My strategy when I feel the need for a bit of exfoliation: Combine this scrub with regular gentle gel cleanser, work in together
review_text: When I first received this jar of exfoliate and scrub, I used it as a "stand-alone" product. I used very wet hands, just a bit of scrub and not too much pressure. It's great: Not too harsh/particles not too large or sharp; fragrance is un-assuming and very pleasant, and my skin feels so soft, with great buoyant texture after I've rinsed and patted dry. I don't feel the need to use it more than a few times a week--definitely not every day. When I do use it, I still feel the need to use my usual Deep Clean facial gel cleanser. Always looking for a way to speed things up and get in and out of the shower quickly, I happened to hit upon a practice that seems to work superbly for me: Now, when I feel the need for a bit of scrub--when my gentle gel cleanser needs a boost--I wet my face and my hands, dip out a bit of this scrub, then pump my gel cleanser on top of it. I work it all onto my face together. Pretty amazing results, and just what I need a few times a week. *I received a free sample from Elrique Naturals.

review_summary: It's not easy finding a good mannequin head
review_text: I wish I could give it less only because I don't want everyone grabbing them up when they are back in stock, but I can't. It's not easy finding a good mannequin head. They usually claim to be a certain length, but the only thing qualifying it as such is about a good 4 inches of thin frazzled hair that has to be cut to make it workable. This one has very little of that, hair is thick at the ends, and good quality not that horse hair feel. I only ordered one to see how it was going to be, I didn't want to be stuck with a gaggle of heads that were barely usable, wish I would have ordered more since they are now out of stock. I will be definitely be checking back for more.

ZUM RUB: Get loaded on a deep moisturizing goat's milk and shea butter salve. Rub it on elbows, frizzy hairs, lips, heels, cuticles, tattoos, anywhere that's dry, damaged, or where your body needs it moist. ZUM BAR: Made with naturally ultra-moisturizing, naturally balanced for the skin, and naturally homogenized goat's milk. || Indigo Wild is famous for its Zum Bar, a goat's milk based soap. Indigo Wild chooses goat's milk because it is naturally homogenized and has naturally occurring triglycerides (good fats). This results in the soap's pH being nearly identical to our own skin and therefore less harsh than most commercial soaps. Indigo Wild is focused on producing and distributing high quality, handmade, all natural goods. All natural raw materials make up each product. The essential oils used to add scent to Indigo Wild's products contain such a high percentage of oils that they are considered to be therapeutic. Any products that require a preservative use natural solutions such as Vitamin E and rosemary. Indigo Wild's products include over a hundred natural materials from as far away as Africa. Made with naturally ultra-moisturizing, naturally balanced for the skin, and naturally homogenized goat's milk. // 100% pure essential oils. All-natural ingredients. Our most popular couple. Frankincense & Myrrh are known to work together to boost the immune system and restore the skin and hair. ZUM RUB: Get loaded on a deep moisturizing goat's milk and shea butter salve. Rub it on elbows, frizzy hairs, lips, heels, cuticles, tattoos, anywhere that's dry, damaged, or where your body needs it moist. ZUM BAR: Made with naturally ultra-moisturizing, naturally balanced for the skin, and naturally homogenized goat's milk. || Indigo Wild is famous for its Zum Bar, a goat's milk based soap. Indigo Wild chooses goat's milk because it is naturally homogenized and has naturally occurring triglycerides (good fats). This results in the soap's pH being nearly identical to our own skin and therefore less harsh than most commercial soaps. Indigo Wild is focused on producing and distributing high quality, handmade, all natural goods. All natural raw materials make up each product. The essential oils used to add scent to Indigo Wild's products contain such a high percentage of oils that they are considered to be therapeutic. Any products that require a preservative use natural solutions such as Vitamin E and rosemary. Indigo Wild's products include over a hundred natural materials from as far away as Africa. Made with naturally ultra-moisturizing, naturally balanced for the skin, and naturally homogenized goat's milk. // 100% pure essential oils. All-natural ingredients. No animal tallow, synthetic colorings or fragrances. Paraben-Free. Sulfate-Free. Cruelty-Free. Made in the USA

review_text: My hair is absolutely fried from hair dye and daily abuse from a flat iron. This ayurvedic hair oil treatment from Apollo Pharmacy has really helped bring it back like it was before I ever messed with it! I grew up watching my mother struggle with hot oil treatments, and remember both the results she got from using oil and how much of a pain it was to have to heat and apply it. This amber oil is used straight out of the bottle and results are noticeable right away! I was surprised at how little I had to use compared to some drug-store products and each strand of my hair looked and felt better! I'm wary of drug store hair treatments, since they contain the same chemicals that helped to ruin my hair in the first place. This hair oil treatment contains amla, bhringraj and olive oils that make my hair feel amazing! The natural ingredients are gentle and work well without leaving my hair feeling greasy or weighed down. I've been very pleased at how well this hair oil has worked, and I'm so glad I have two bottles of it to last me! I was provided with a sample of this product but price doesn't change how great my hair looks, nor does it effect my review.

review_text: I was a little nervous honestly because this is my first purchase of a synthetic lace wig. But I will say this blew me away! review_text: I love it! I will be ordering this again. I have thyroid damaged hair, for years I suffered with thinning brittle hair. I started using henna but I wasn't crazy about having orange red hair. I did like how healthy my hair started looking though. I decided to try adding indigo to my henna to get a more brown color. I was sent this indigo free by the manufacturer in exchange for an honest review. So I tried it. I mixed my henna with equal parts of indigo, and orange juice to make it permanent. When the liquid is added it smells like a freshly cut field of hay, so if ur a farm or ranch girl, or u just love horses, u'll love the smell. And the instructions on the packet were easy to read btw, even though I didn't follow them exactly. I divided my hair into sections. And I put my gloves on before applying to my hair. I was afraid the indigo would be difficult to wash off of the sink and my skin, but it wasnt. After I applied what looked like a mud mask for my hair lol, I simply wiped off any little spots on my skin and the sink. I let it stay on my hair the recommended couple of hours. It was a little gritty when rinsed out. But it rinsed out easily. As for the finished product, I love it! Check out the pic i posted! It feels silky and soft, perfect healthy hair! And the best part is that the packet of indigo is so large that it's going to last at least 3 months! It was so easy to use, I may even follow the directions exactly, and dye my hair blue black.

review_summary: Then and only then apply the indigo for the best coverage. Otherwise the indigo won't stick to the ...
review_text: It is necessary to buy a package of pure henna ( red! ) and apply per directions. After this is on your head two hours, wash out with conditioner. Then and only then apply the indigo for the best coverage. Otherwise the indigo won't stick to the hair. It is a long process but very worthwhile. The dye will be PERMANENT and last until it grows out. There are many wonderful sites that offer photos and info about how to apply henna, indigo, and henndigo ( a combination of the two ) for all sorts of colors and beautiful results. Do some research first and you are likely to have a better experience. Bon Chance! :)

review_summary: Nice big clasp for women with a lot of hair
review_text: I love these clips and was so glad to find them here, because they are not in my local stores anymore. It took a while to find them, though, because I didn't know what search terms to use, and "hair clip" doesn't really differentiate it from the rest. I had been calling these 'barrel clasps' because of their round barrel shape, but that got me nowhere, and I wound up just finding these by accident. Thank goodness. In my opinion, these are preferable to the butterfly clasps and the 'jaw' clasps because they can blend into your hair or hairdo very well so people will notice the hair, and not so much the clasp. How I use them: I wear my long hair in an upsweep on the job, usually using long bobby pins or chignon pins to hold it. I first began using these when I injured my shoulder then had surgery and couldn't raise my right arm high enough or long enough to work with my hair. Since then, I comb it up and twist it into a sort of bun, and then clasp the whole thing with one of these and it holds nice and tight. If the hair swirls out a bit it can look a little casual but the clip doesn't slide down. For a more formal look, now that I'm healed up, I will make a tighter bun and just clasp it more carefully so there are no loose hairs or ends sticking out (or I may even put it up slightly wet). I'm spoiled by the speed of it now ;) I hope these are available for a long time. About the hair: Mine is a little long (just below my shoulder blades) and I have good volume, but it's neither thick nor thin. These should work for anyone with thick hair, or high-volume hair, or long hair doubled back on itself in an updo. About the quality: After a lot of use, the plastic in these tends to fatigue on the curve leading toward the hinge. With careful use it can last a long time. I bought a lot and stocked up.

review_summary: The headbands feel fairly robust (they feel like they won't snap with even a little stretch like ...
review_text: I am an Asian male and these headbands work very well for me. The headbands feel fairly robust (they feel like they won't snap with even a little stretch like many others) maybe due to the cloth wrapping. The cloth is adhered quite securely to the headbands and provide a TON of grip. I was not expecting this, but they provide even more grip than the small studs on the underside of some other headbands. The designs are fairly nice and unisex, although a couple are pushing the border. I thought there was a mistake when I received two with the same design, but after looking closer at the picture, there are indeed two headbands with the orange pattern. Overall, the patterns were not as appealing as I thought they would be from looking at the pictures, which is why I would dock a star to 4/5. The colors seem too pastel for my taste. I know I am not the target audience, but some of the patterns were too feminine for me. My favorite is the black and white one, which very easily can be unisex. Next are the two orange ones. The pattern looks a lot less like camo and a lot more like a koi fish pattern. Next is a black headband with a Japanese looking flower pattern. My least favorite is the pink one. The design vaguely resembles intricate graffiti or some intensely stickered JDM car, which I thought would provide enough character to make it unisex, but the colors prevent it from being so. The main colors are cotton candy pink and a pale lime green. The quality of these is excellent, but the design just doesn't suit me. I will probably end up giving most of these away, since these would make great little presents.

review_text: This is a wonderful set and ideal for anyone who loves the "nude" color eyeshadow. There are 120 eye shadow colors in this palette! This is such a wide spectrum of colors, it's amazing. You have your shimmer colors, you have your matte colors and you have almost every single color you could possibly want or need for any occasion, daily wear, oh my gosh I'm in love. Although the pans aren't very deep, you don't really need them to be because the pigments are definitely true to color. So it's not like you have to use your brush and dig into your pan in order to get a color. Even a light switch is enough to get the perfect color. The case is really nice, and although I was slightly worried about having a double layer palette, I'm not anymore. The fallout hasn't been an issue and honestly I really just love the fact that this is so easy to store away. I would definitely recommend this palette, there is nothing that I dislike about it. Please note: I received this product at a discount in exchange for my honest and unbiased review.
