review_summary: The item arrived in excellent condition. I was concerned since other reviews stated ...
review_text: The item arrived in excellent condition. I was concerned since other reviews stated broken eye shadow and blending, however these arrived perfect. The pigment is standard, I would have like to be more vibrant, thus the four stars. After applying a second time the color is more prominent. I wear a primer and there is no bleeding or creasing of the eye shadow, it stays put. I don't carry cosmetics with me, so I apply only in the morning when preparing for the day. I have sensitive skin and experienced no irritation, only normal wear. I have received a discount on the product in exchange for my unbiased review.

review_text: I bought this makeup for a friend of mine who is a makeup artist. She loved this product. Most eyeshadow cases this big include more colors that you would never use however in this case all the colors were ones that you could use for anything. I didn't see an ugly color in the whole set. It also came in a nice plastic black case. The makeup brushes that came with it were awesome. Light weight and soft to the touch. Most brushes at I have bought the bristles fall out when you use them. These were perfect the whole set is awesome. In the reviews I have read about this product people have said that when they received it all the eyeshadow was broken. When I received the product not one was broken. It was in perfect condition. So I definitely recommend the product. I received this product at a discounted rate for a fair and impartial review

review_summary: Eyeshadow, Brushes, and Packaging Review- Bestrice 120 Colors Eye Shadow Palette Camouflage Makeup Palette Kit + 11 Pro Bamboo C
review_text: I have just purchased Bestrice 120 Colors Eye Shadow Palette Camouflage Makeup Palette Kit + 11 Pro Bamboo Cosmetic Makeup Brush Set. Here are my thoughts... Brushes: I think that brushes are great quality and there are a nice range of brushes for beginners. The bristles are soft and the handles are easy to hold, while trying to apply make-up. Eye Shadows: I think some of the eye shadows apply nicely and are very pigmented but, some sadly are not as pigmented. If you wet some of the less pigmented shadows they should show up better. I wish that some of the colors were more pigmented and were true to the color online and in the eye shadow palette. Packaging: I enjoy the packaging but wish it had a logo. I think that the eye shadows should be glued to the palette and not just stacked on top of each other in the palette. When the product was sent to me the way that the eye shadows were packaged made multiple break. I think this should be fixed. Overall I enjoy the products but I wish that some thing such as, pigmentation, packaging, and the eye shadows being true to color should be fixed. If you were wondering the company did give me a discount on their product and that anything I said is based of my opinion.

review_text: This is a review for the Bestrice 120 colors eye shadow palette camouflage beauty kit with brushes. The eye shadow kit, the shadows are rather tiny and the pigmentation in them isn't very strong but they do work. You just might have to do a reapply later on in the day. But they work fine and do not cause any kind of irritation during usage. The brush set comes with a very nice variety of brushes. The bristles are very soft and they blend very well. The first couple of uses the brushes were losing bits of bristles during the use. I am hoping that it is just shedding those that were joust loose during shipping and this does not continue throughout owning the. The brushes do blend quite nicely though and they feel really nice against my skin. I received this beauty set as a promotional test product to use and review. This is my honest and unbiased opinion after using the set.

review_text: Growing up, my mother has always cut my hair. She wants to save money so she got her own set and has been doing that since. She even does my son's hair too. I got the scissor for her so she can keep cutting hair with a better scissor than the one she got. We really like the carrying case the scissor comes with along with oil and sheet to keep it clean. It helps the scissor last a long time from now. It cut better than before, she actually gets the cut she wants than to be struggling with a lousy old scissor. I can sense it does boost her confidence in cutting hair again. I want to mention that my mother and I never went to beauty school or is a hairdresser. It's a hobby for my mom and a money-saving hack for me. I like to do my bang myself and this scissor are awesome. Whenever I need the scissor, I can come to my mom's home and grab the case. They would make a nice gift for student becoming a hairdresser. My best friend used to be a hairdresser and want to go back to school since it has been a while for her. She tried it out while giving me a haircut, she loved it. She likes the silicone grip on the scissor that allows her to feel comfortable while cutting. She is planning to get one for herself when she goes back to school. I guess in her opinion, it is worth to get this product. I received this product for free in exchange for my honest and unbiased review.

review_summary: Really great idea, but would not go in to my hair without someone else's assistance. Ripped my hair.
review_text: I really dislike leaving negative reviews for items, but I couldn't even get these into my hair to see if they work I have shoulder length, very straight hair. I followed the instructions and attempted to put these in on towel dampened hair which I had used conditioner on. I was able to get about half of these in my hair and each section took two-three tries before my hair would go into the curl former. When I got to the top of my head, my hair wouldn't go in at all and I felt like I was ripping out my hair. Maybe these work better if you have someone else doing your hair, but I'm a woman in my thirties and do not have that luxury on a day to day basis. These are going back. I was really, really hoping these would work but they just would not go in!

review_text: Great for costume or one time use.
product_title: MOCOO 80cm New Women's Beautiful Long Curly Cosplay Hair Wig Glamour /Fashion/Party Costume Wig(Dark Green)JF006D
product_description:
Material is heat resistant synthetic fiber which can be styled by heat tool. It is both natural looking and soft touch. You can wear it to parties as well as for daily use .

Cleaning Instruction:
1. Comb the wig, notes: if it is a long wig, please comb it from ponytail to top .
2. Put the wig in cold or warm water for 5 to 10 minutes, NOT hot water.Time can't be too long, or hair is easy to fall off .
3. Use clear water to clean, Hand wash, Pleaes DON'T use the washing machine .
4. Choose wig shampoo, avoid scrub, Gently grasp the wig with hands .
5. Wipe the water with dry towel, Please DON'T screwed by hand or by a washing machine to dry.
6. Put a airy place, avoid by drying in sunshine.
How to collection:
1.If you don't wear the wig temporarily, please spray some nursing liquid and put on mannequin head .
2.If you don't wear for a long time, please set the wig with a hairnet after spray nursing liquid and put into a bag with small round holes.
3. Keep in a dry place, avoid pressure .

review_summary: These work great, and don't show in darker hair.
review_text: My daughter is a dancer, and we go through a LOT of hairpins. It can be hard to find hairpins rather than bobby pins. Then they tend to bend, as many are made of very flimsy material. They work effortlessly without worries about breaking during use, rusting, bending easily, tearing hair, etc. I have tried Goody brand before and these Amish crinkled type top Goody brand in hair pins. I recommend purchasing these over any Goody brand hair pins any day. I can put my hair up in a bun in the morning, using two of the same pins day after day all day long without worries and fiddling too much with my hair, and I can forget it until bedtime preparation...so cozy in fact, I often unintentionally forget about it and can wear them through the night and the pins are just as good to use the next day as they were the day before. They will even keep my hair to stay put through intense workouts. Happy customer! Would totally buy again! If you bought Goody brand in the past and were not satisfied, it's worth waiting and saving your money to spend towards these!

review_summary: Very DARK, not LIGHT Ash Brown.
review_text: Since I had read all of the reviews prior to purchasing this color (Light Ash Brown 5.1), I knew that this color was going to go on darker than my desired end result of Light Ash Brown. So, I also purchased the Schwarzkopf Igora Royal Permanent Hair Color in Light Ash Blonde 8.1 and mixed equal parts w/the Schwarzkopf Blond Me Developer 2%/7 vol. (1:1:1). STILL, my hair turned out way too dark. If you'd like to see the results, the video is on YouTube "Dark Chocolate Brown to Light Ash Brown - Step #2: Schwarzkopf Igora 5.1 & 8.1" on Shawna Who. I've also attached photos of the before and after. Based on my experience w/the Schwarzkopf Igora Light Ash Brown 5.1 Permanent Hair Color, I wouldn't use anything darker than 6.1 to achieve a Light Ash Brown color in the future. Hence, only 3 stars due to the color result not matching the color name.

review_text: The Softlips Cubes are really fantastic. If you're a fan, this is a great set to get. The lip balms smell and feel great on your lips - they not only moisturize, but they help relieve discomfort from dry or cracked lips. AND they contain SPF which is a major plus! The lone downside is that the packaging, while extremely cute, is very bulky. I like that I don't have to worry about the cube rolling off of my desk at work or being hard to find in my bag, but I don't like how hard it is to carry around in the pocket of my skinny jeans. Flavor round-up: *Salted Caramel - This is a great limited edition flavor in a too-cute silver glittery cube. My husband says it smells more like maple syrup than caramel though, and he may be right. *Fresh Mint - A perfect classic flavor and very refreshing. *Pomegranate Blueberry - A tangy, fruity flavor that has a noticeably tart/tangy smell/taste. It reminds me a bit of a sweet tart candy.

review_text: The base where the bristles connect does heat up, and you can choose the temperature, which is a nice feature. However, it's still heat-treating your hair, which causes the same damage as a flat iron or a curling iron. review_summary: I absolutely love this unit now
review_text: I absolutely love this unit now, but before I was very disappointed. First the delivery was all screwed up but fixed quickly, second the unit only had half of it with root and literally the other half without root, third the lace was stained with blonde dye I'm some parts. Also the hair looked to be damaged. However, despite all of these setbacks I absolutely love this unit (now)! I have always avoided putting color or dyeing my unit from fear of messing up (especially with the price of this unit in particular) but with everything wrong I had to be brave and fix this unit. I definitely didn't want to send it back because I've looked for months for a wig exactly like this for this reasonable of a price. Anyway, with a lot of research beforehand, I added a natural brown root throughout the unit (box dye color #2) and since the hair was damaged due to processing, I didn't want to further damage it by toning it so I let it sit in water with purple shampoo and white conditioner for about 20 minutes to get an ash blonde color (because this hair is very yellow, especially on darker skin). It doesn't come pre-plucked, so you do have to pluck the hairline. But after all that it is most def one of my favorite units. I get so many compliments! I'm very happy it came the way it did, it was my first time customizing a unit. Def was a blessing in disguise. Probably will buy again because the hair is soft, sheds a little, but very manageable.

review_text: Okay so this wig is bomb! I am absolutely in love! I made my first video review for it so don't laugh but the image does not do this wig justice! I will most definitely purchase from this seller again. I was pretty skeptical about ordering from a seller for an item with no reviews. For my very detailed review for those who can't access the video: The contents of the package included the wig in a mesh net, a plastic storage bag for the wig, eyelashes (for free major plus), the description of the hair on a card. The hair itself is very flowy and soon soft its a lace frontal style for the cap so you can pretty much part all the way from the hairline to the top middle section of your hair. The lace is from ear to ear in the front and on the nape of the neck in the back. It has 3 hair combs in it in the front and a band in the back to tighten it. It says that is 100% Brazilian hair. I got major compliments on this wig. Cons- My only complaint is that the cap was a little big I have a pretty small head and a lot of hair and they didn't have size options.. but i still made it work! But that is why I gave it 4 stars only because it didn't have an size option. Other than the hair is beautiful, takes well to heat, easy to style =) If you have any questions please feel free to ask. Check out my video and my pictures. -Diamond :)

product_title: (Pair) 2 X MyProStyler PURPLE THERMAL Heat Resistant Glove Use For Hair Styling Tools
product_description_filled: Product: (Pair) 2 X MyProStyler PURPLE THERMAL Heat Resistant Glove Use For Hair Styling Tools.

review_text: I am seriously impressed with these heat resistant styling gloves. They feel a tiny bit scratchy when you put them on but they fit very well. I was a little worried how well they could actually work since you can see a little skin through them, kind of a thicker mesh type material but I didn't need to worry. The work great and do exactly what they are supposed to. As you can see in one of my photos, I have my fingers placed on the bottom ceramic plate of my straightening iron (you can see that the red light is on). Once I got up the nerve, I placed my hand there for a full 15 seconds. At the 15 second mark is when my fingers start to get hot. Not so much that they felt like they were burning though. Probably not the smartest or safest thing to do but I really wanted to see how much heat this would protect my fingers and hands from. The material didn't melt or get misshapen. I am happy to know that I will not be getting burned while doing my hair from now on. Now if I just had something like this to cover my forehead, haha! Most people who have used a curling iron on bangs know exactly what I'm talking about. Anyways, I am relieved to have these gloves and so glad I was able to get them for free in exchange for my honest review.
product_title: (Pair) 2 X MyProStyler PURPLE THERMAL Heat Resistant Glove Use For Hair Styling Tools
product_description_filled: Product: (Pair) 2 X MyProStyler PURPLE THERMAL Heat Resistant Glove Use For Hair Styling Tools.

review_summary: Nice purple thermal heat resistant gloves
review_text: I wasn't sure what to expect when I ordered this heat protectant gloves. It says it protects your hands from heat styling tools. When the gloves came, I tried it on to make sure it would fit, and it fit perfectly. It's not very thick (which is nice) and it does exactly what it says, protects your hands from heat. It's better to use as a touch up, as you can start to feel the heat but it doesn't burn. It comes with two gloves but you can use one or both, it's up to you. The gloves look like an exfoliating bath glove and is stiff and scratchy but it doesn't affect the way it feels when you're wearing them. They also have a hook so you can hang the gloves when you're not using them, which is really nice. They fit all hand types, small or large. I received this product at a discount. This is my honest opinion.

review_text: As much as I don't like writing negative reviews, I will write one when a product earns it. This cape is extremely thin. It has a very small piece of velcro and ties at the neck. Because there is only one piece of velcro right at the edge of each side of the cape, it's not adjustable. If adjustment is needed, it must be done by using the ties. The idea of tying a cape tightly enough to prevent hair from getting under it is not appealing to me, especially for children. Tying anything around a child's neck just seems like a bad idea. The picture provided by the seller shows an elastic neck but that is not what I received. I can see this cape repelling a very small amount of water but it's so thin that it won't repel much. It is very slick, which will allow cut hair to slide off to the floor. As I inspected the cape, I tugged one of the ties while holding onto the cape and the cape ripped almost instantly. It wasn't a small tear, either--it tore a lot very quickly and without much force. The duster seems to be decent, although bristles came out as I examined it. It's very soft--that's the best thing this set has going for it. I was sent a free sample of the duster and cape in exchange for my review.

review_summary: Too fragile, broke on first use.
review_text: First, I received this hairdressing cape free for testing and review. I recognize that a review of a free product is something fundamentally different from that of a product for which one has paid, but I do believe that such reviews are useful when the process is respected and I've tried to do that here. What you're getting with this order: (1) hairdressing cape 55" X 37" What is this and why might I want it?: This is meant to be a cape similar to those a professional uses when cutting your hair. It may interest those who do their own haircuts at home and want a cape to protect the wearer. At the posting of this review, it is being offered at the very low end of the budget price point at $6. Does it work?: My wife cuts my hair and that of our children and I agreed to test this product hoping it would be something we could use for a long time. I have the following observations to share: Appearance: It looks much like the capes used at professional salons. It is all black with a Velcro neck. Build: Extremely light weight. Much lighter than any I've seen used in a salon. This is a very thin nylon that does indeed repel a bit of water and lets the hair slide down, but is subject to tearing and breakage from even light duty use. My sample actually tore at the Velcro connection of the neck on the very first use. It was not even being used on an adult sized neck, just a child's. We have continued to use it, but the Velcro square has ripped away and is no longer functional. Function: Yes it provides some coverage and some protection from the spray bottle, but it is so fragile that it broke on first use. It provides decent protection from the front but poor closure in the back ends up defeating some of the purpose of even using the product. Any negatives?: These have already been covered but I'll summarize: -Material used is much thinner than salon capes. Highly vulnerable to damage with even light use. -Velcro connector tore on very first use -Closure is not adjustable Bottom line: Though it is offered at a very low price, this product is still too fragile to recommend. It tore during its first use and though we are continuing to use it, remember that I got it free. I wouldn't pay for this, nor would I recommend that you do. While it does provide protection from hair and from water spray, look elsewhere as this cape simply won't hold up to use.

review_summary: it looks pretty good. I was surprised when I put it ...
review_text: I've owned a lot of cheap salon capes. They usually come with the hair styling tools. Most of the time, they are falling apart right out of the package. This is an inexpensive cape, but it is the nicest cape I have. In fact, I went and threw out three of my other cheap capes in favor of this one. It isn't falling apart. In fact, it looks pretty good. I was surprised when I put it on my 12-year-old daughter that the back covered her neck all the way down to the seat. It doesn't look like it would provide such good coverage from the photo on Amazon's listing. This cape is thin, lightweight, and breathable. Hair slides off (unlike another one I own that collects it through static cling). For younger children, the fit might be too loose around the neck, but it's good for older children and adults. There's a tiny bit of Velcro, which I used instead of the ties. They could have made that Velcro larger, but it actually did hold the cape closed. It performs exactly as expected, so I could focus on cutting my daughter's hair and not worry about whether or not her cape is staying on her. This product was provided for review by eacmall.

review_text: I have a 9 month old baby so I am always looking for good natural products to use on her. The wash comes out as soap and it is very soapy and think. You don't have to use too much, a little goes a long way. Rubs in very easily and washes off very easily also. The scent is very pleasant and I like that it contains ingredients such as aloe vera. It seems to be tear free because I got some on her face and rinsed it off immediately, it didn't seem to bother her too much. This wash did not dry out her skin or irritate it which is a plus. My baby smelled really good after her bath and her skin and hair were soft. This wash is a lot more gentle than Johnson and the smell isn't as strong, I feel more comfortable using this on her versus that brand. I would pay the extra buck. product_title: LAIA Naturals Premium Organic Castor Oil with Natural Vitamin E for Hair, Brows and Skin, 2 oz.
product_description:
Introducing 100% Pure Cold Pressed Castor Oil with Added Organic Vitamin E by LAIA, the natural supplement to help give you healthy skin and hair.
Organic Castor Oil with Natural Vitamin E by LAIA Naturals is an all-in-one skin care treatment oil, so you can have smooth, silky skin that looks and feels healthy. When applied to your hair, youll be amazed at the results, giving you stronger, thicker and shinier hair. Feel rejuvenated again with our all-natural Castor Oil, made in the USA.
Organic Hair Care
Enjoy healthy, gorgeous and thick hair again, feeling softer and shinier than ever before. This oil is a must have supplement if your hair is prone to split ends, breakages, tangling and thinning. If you suffer from dandruff or a dry scalp, then this oil is for you. Enjoy younger and softer feeling hair with LAIAs natural Castor Oil.
Organic Vitamin E
Every bottle of LAIAs Natural Castor Oil contains natural Vitamin E, an addition that no other Castor Oil on the market can claim. Vitamin E is an excellent, natural remedy for scars, acne, blemishes and irritation. Its excellent for tired marks under the eyes and helps moisturize your skin and hair.
USDA Approved
LAIA Naturals Organic Castor Oil with Vitamin E is USDA-Certified. Our organic castor oil is packaged in a beautiful amber glass bottle, which features a top dropper for ease of use. We believe that you will be completely satisfied with our product, but if at any point, you are not 100% satisfied, please contact us so that we can send a replacement bottle or provide a full refund.
For healthy, attractive and softer skin and hair, Organic Castor Oil by LAIA Naturals is a must have daily supplement. Enjoy!

review_summary: Hair that looks and smells fantastic.
review_text: Ever since the first time I tried argan oil on my color treated curly hair I was infatuated. I was quick to find out not all argan products were created equal, and while some leave my hair hydrated, light and bouncy others can weigh it down and leave it oily. Now there is always a risk buying a beauty product online but I have to say this product is a risk worth taking. The smell is amazing, it is crazy good, I almost wish it was a lotion and perfume as well type of good (be prepared to spend extra time in the shower just enjoying the scent.) It lathers well, and rinses clean. After my shower my comb moves smoothly through my hair even with cold rinsing, which is a major plus. When it dries my hair is soft, silky with a well defined curl and a light scent. Even the muted version of the scent in my dry hair is amazing; my husband keeps sniffing my hair. I would recommend this product for any hair type, but particularly for dry or damaged hair as it will see the most benefit from usage. review_summary: Not as scalp irritating nor drying as other brands.
review_text: I have really really thick hair. It's down to my shoulders on the sides and back and layered upwards. The top layers are about 5" long. My hair is wavy and unruly. It takes a good 45 minutes to 1 hour to even attempt to straighten or style it. My hair would feel brittle and rough. Within an hour or so, it would kink back up. Not to mention, it would take almost 2 tablespoons of shampoo to get it to feel clean. Then I tried this shampoo. It took 2 small squeezes. I noticed quite a g [d lather and bubbles, but no where near as many as name brands you buy in stores. I always leave shampoo in for a few minutes, as recommended by a beautician. I towel and air dry 99% of the time. My hair did not feel as rough, brittle, or unruly as normal. It felt lighter, almost like it brought out more natural curl and bounce. I did not use conditioner several times after using this. It didn't feel that my hair needed it. It did not seem to take as long to straighten, either. I did not notice too much of a scent to this shampoo, but it had some scent. I honestly can't tell you the exact scent. I love it that water is the first ingredient and alcohol doesn't appear in til the 8th ingredient listed. I'm very cautious with anything containing alcohol within the first 4 ingredients. It drys my hair and scalp out to where I'm constantly itching and get really bad dandruff. My scalp has not has near the itching and has had less flaking. review_summary: Super soft and silky results! Works fast on breakage and split ends!
review_text: Wow! I've tried a lot of different Argan Oil shampoo and conditioners (and sprays and masks and hot treatments etc) and I can 100% say this is my All time favorite for no other reason than how incredibly fast I'm seeing a difference in the ends and improvement on breakage. I color my hair and have been for close to 10 years now and just in the past year or so I've started having really bad problems with breakage and split ends. I've tried probably 10 different brands or more with some kind of argan oil treatment and it really helps. But I didn't get results like this from anywhere else, and I've tried some pretty pricey stuff. After like, 3 days of use I happened to look down at my hair one day and it just hit me that I didn't have any frizz or areas that looked wild and untamed from breakage, the hairs that would normally have 2 or 3 splits or frays were just smooth all the way down. I tried to take a picture of the hair up close so you could see but couldn't get a clear shot at such a short distance. The color looks richer and has a healthy looking shine, it isn't greasy or stringy like you might worry about with Argan Oil. This stuff even smells amazing! I usually like coconut scents, it's always been my favorite, but this smells more floral and a little spicy, which maybe sounds weird but I think it's soooo good. It lathers up surprisingly well for an Argan Oil shampoo and I don't have to use much for my bra strap length hair. My hair is really thick, too, but a good quarter sized dallop works out to be about the right amount for me. I do the ends and body first and work my way up to my scalp, backwards from how I use regular shampoo. (I do this because some brands seem to leave my hair oily if I don't get it rinsed out well, that Argan Oil can be stubborn.) I usually let it set for a couple minutes while I wash my body so the hair can absorb the nutrients before I rinse it away. I follow it with their conditioner and my hair gets sooo soft when it dries. I really can't stress enough how well it helps my hair. I know everyone responds differently but for me, it's better than anything else I've tried. I'll be ordering this again for sure. I did receive my Argain oil shampoo at a promotional price for testing and evaluation purposes. review_text: I have natural salt & pepper hair and this tended to darken my white hair simply because it's adding color to hair that's already colorless. My hair has no yellow cast so I didn't need it to neutralize that. But having said that, it is a quality hair color and I would still recommend to people who want to tone bleached hair and it will only do it's job if the hair is bleached to the correct level. For my hair I got the same effect as if I used a silver shampoo so I probably won't use this hair color again.

review_summary: Soft and trendy headbands for the win!
review_text: I got these headbands because I, like most stay at home moms, am allllll about the lazy hair. But sometimes, you want to be lazy, and still a little cute. These headbands do exactly that. I have soft hair and even the headbands with the grips can start to slip on me. But these, surprisingly enough have minimal slippage for me. I can be lazy and have my hair in a messy bun and the headbands take it from frumpy to cute. I have a lob hair style so I like to curl it, run my hair through it-to give it a more natural curly look. These headbands definitely give me the nice switch up to where my hair isn't just down and curly again, it has an adorable headband! ;) I like to pair with a plain boyfriend tee, skinny jeans, and converse-or for more dressy- a long plain maxi dress or skirt. Add a pendant necklace and wedges/cute sandals and you're set! Now lets talk about the price! Basically, you can't beat it. I paid $7.95 for a 2 pack. I mean, I have bought a plain black turban headband for 10.99! For just one. And some on amazon will be 14.99. So, these are worth the cost! Do it, you will not regret it.

review_text: I'm not a fan of straighteners because I'm always afraid it will damage my hair but this is gentle yet effective. I had my doubts but it surprised me and actually did what it claimed, especially with my fine hair. It heats up to 260 degrees celsius or 500 degrees fahrenheit, at the that high of a temperature would it a normal two plate straightener would burn and damage my hair but I don't feel that this would ruin my hair if it was turned up all the way because the hair is not being sandwiched between to hot plates. It adds shine and straightens the hair or in my case tames the fly-a-ways. There was no product in my hair prior to using and after being out in the wind for a couple of hours it did get frizzy again but not as bad as usual. On my second try I added my favorite pre-straightening product and my hair held all day, no heavy mouse or gel was needed. I really like this hair brush straightener and feel I can use this without worry of damage to my hair. The temperature on this hair brush straightener starts at celsius but if you push the + and - at the same time it will change to fahrenheit. -I received this product at a discount for my honest and unbiased review.

review_text: I own salons and let me tell this product did wonders on my hair.. I only used this bc my stylists had left over and never tried or sold it so .. of course it went home with me. So here's the weird thing... I have fine but lots of hair. My daughter is Columbian and has thick hair that can be frizzy. My hair never looks thick and sexy, and mostly looks boring and fly away with no texture .. my daughters is beautiful but can be very frizzy if she loses control... but with this product we BOTH now it looks fabulous and feels fabulous. I paired this with the Sexy Rose Elixer which you apply wet and WOW.. First off this shampoo is lower lather so don't panic or over use.. apply at roots and work down.... the conditioner is thick..I combed it through and found i used too much.. then i rinsed super well with luke warm water and towel dried.. i applied the rose elixer all through it and later a little argan oil to areas that were fly away, to help thicken the look after it dried.. my hair is incredible looking.. it has volume like i haven't seen in years and I literally did NOTHING.. air dried.. All i did was shook my head and ran my fingers through my roots to give it some lift ... i look like i spent hours on my hair and i didn't. I resprayed a few more quick sprays of rose oil and added just a tinge of argan oil to a few fly away pieces to hold them in place.. my hair curled up like i haven't seen.. it looks like i have a really thick head of hair or perhaps a perm .. thick and curly.. thank you Sexy. My daughter did similar but added more oil .. if i use more than three drops of the heavy stuff i look greasy.. she can handle 10 drops easily

review_text: I am very happy with this straightener. I myself have long, very curly hair, it is about 6 inches below my bra strap. I don't often attempt at straightening my hair because of the amount of time involved and because of the often awkward positioning I have to use to accurately get the job done. It usually takes a good 45 minutes using a flat iron. Using this brush took only about 15 minutes and that was with a first time user. The brush came with very easy to understand, comprehensive instructions. It explained what all the buttons and such were, the different setting styles and how to achieve the best result. I was very glad that is explained things so well. It recommended pitting product in your hair before use and drying thoroughly beforehand. I did not do this for my first test run and still came out with an amazing result. I have since, in later applications used product in my hair beforehand as recommended and the result was even better. I was worried about burning either my scalp or my hair (having done both before using a flat iron) , but the teeth on the brush keep it a safe distance from my scalp and neck. I also found that the manner in which the hair is gathered at your starting point keep you from getting that "flat ridge starting point" that looks horrible. It was a smooth from start to finish. It sits in such a manner on the counter that it is not going to burn anything also. It also has a thermostat that is very accurate for different types of hair. I am VERY pleased with this product. I highly recommend it, for both "first time" flatteners or "seasoned" flatteners. I did receive this product at a discount for my unbiased opinion. I will however be purchasing several more as gifts.

review_summary: Want fabulous hair in half the time? You need to try this!!
review_text: I have to start out by saying I did not have high hopes for this product. I have read many reviews on different straightening brushes and none sounded all that convincing. I ordered the pink, I knew my daughter would love it and we have both been waiting to try one out! An instruction book was included with clear and concise instructions. The brush is heavy duty and seems to be made with quality materials. The full straighter measures about 10.5" and the brush area is about 5" long and 3' wide . The bristles are nice and strong and seem like they will stand the test of time. There is a power button and a + and - button to increase and decrease the temperature on the side of the handle. You need to hold the power button for a few seconds and then the LED display will light up. You will see the temperature rise as it heats. The default temperature is in Celsius, but this can be changed to Fahrenheit by pressing the "+" and "-" buttons at same time. I followed the recommendation to set it to highest temperature at first, and then decrease the temperature level on the basis of your hair quality. The suggested temperatures per hair types is: 365 for delicate colored fine hair; 410 for natural texture hair; and 450 for thick or wavy hair. I found the best for me is around 420. I only needed to let it heat up for a few minutes and it was ready to go. It immediately worked as soon as I started and I was so excited. I saw results from the first strokes. My hair was straight and shiny! It didn't look like straw which sometimes happens with my ends using the straight iron. I did use a heat protectant oil as usual. I love how much easier this is to hold and maneuver than the standard hair straightener. There is such a lesser chance of burns as well with this. This worked really fast and saved me at least 15 minutes. I will be using this on the regular now. The greatest thing about this straightener is the 3 in 1 function: Not only is it a Ceramic Iron Straightener it is also a De-tangling Brush AND an Anion Hair Massager. I highly recommend this product for anyone looking for fabulous hair in half the time! Disclaimer: I received this product at a discounted rate for my unbiased review.

review_text: This. Is. Stunning. Seriously! And the experience of using sandalwood brushes/combs is like no other, I don't think I could ever buy just a regular wooden hair tool ever again, I've been ruined lol. I have a sandalwood hair brush and I adore it, so I have been looking at these sandalwood combs for a bit now. I love that they have so many different designs, but I wanted something somewhat gender neutral because I have this wild idea that I will some day pass these on to my hypothetical children (I'm nuts, I know lol!) and so I found this one. It is a beautiful design that I could definitely see passed down through generations and it is made so well and sturdy that it just feels so good in your hand. It isn't too heavy, but it does feel substantial. It works great, of course, as wide toothed combs do. What I love about using wood on my hair is that cleaning them is so easy. I have been no-poo (no shampoo, I use baking soda and vinegar to clean and condition my hair) for two years now and the only down side is that my brushes get dirty quite easy, and cleaning them is difficult- unless they are wood ;) I just pull the hair out of this and use my hand to brush off any "dust" from my hair and it's all done! I have washed my wood brush with soap and water before but I might not ever have to do that with this comb, judging from my first few uses of it. It comes in a beautiful cardboard box that I will reuse around the house somehow and a cure little note card. I am so incredibly pleased with this! I got this comb at a discount in exchange for my unbiased review. I hope that my honest feedback was helpful for you.

product_description_filled: Product: Envy Professional Ionic Heat Brush Hair Straightener , Flat Iron Straightening Hot Brush Dual Voltage 110v - 240v For Silky Straight Hair.

review_summary: Not Great for Thick/Wavy Hair. Pretty & OK for Touch-Ups
review_text: My whole life I've needed to use a hair straightener. I have very thick strands of hair and a lot of it. Plus, my hair is poofy crazy curly. My hair used to be down to my butt, however, this past year I had to cut it all off due to getting a horrid matted mess. (If you don't know what it means to have matted hair - your lucky). It was a whole bunch of tears, pain, tantrums, home remedies, a ton of hair salon visits and a ton of money spent until realizing that I was s*** outta luck and had to cry as they cut my hair to only an inch in the back, but luckily had enough hair left / saved on top and on sides for shoulder length hair. So now more than ever, having short hair that's very thick and curly, I'm always looking for amazing hair straighteners and products in general. I have wanted one of these heat and style brushes and finally decided to test this one out. I loved the color of this heat brush and it looked like a nice, high quality hair straightening brush in the images. This brush has less options then I thought it would. I cannot control the temperature and I would like for it to get a little bit hotter. Since I have curly, wavy hair this doesn't heat up enough to get it straight. Or maybe it's not doing a great job because it doesn't have two "plates" like regular straighteners. If I straighten my hair with a flat iron, this is a great touch up tool for the days following the flat iron before I wash my hair again. SO - It does work, but it is NOT a miracle product. This hair straightening brush (& all brush type of straighteners) MIGHT work better / work faster / have better results if you have thin hair? Just a assumption. One difference I noticed was the way my hair felt after styling with the Envy brush. When I use my flat iron, my hair is...flat. The flat iron leaves my hair very smooth but it doesn't seem to have much texture or body left after straightening. When I used the Envy brush, my hair was straight, but still had plenty of volume. I'm really happy I bought the Envy styling brush. I really like the volume my hair has after using this brush. I had to completely comb through my hair to smooth it out before using this brush (obviously). I started out by just running the Envy brush through my hair. Once I was done brushing my hair, I sectioned off my hair for the best results. I sectioned off the top 2/3 of my hair, twisted and secured it to the top of my head. As always, I focused on the underside first. When I finished the under layer, I moved on to the middle section, and then the top. The whole process took me about 20minutes. Pretty close to the same amount of time that it takes me to use my regular flat iron. An ion is as an atom in which the number of electrons and protons are not the same. When a hair tool has ionic in its name, it means that it can generate negative ions. Hair has high water content, making it positively charged. When negative ions come in contact with hair, the positive charge is neutralized. This leaves your hair straight, sleek, shiny and smooth. Here is one crucial thing to keep in mind not all flat irons are pure ceramic, many of them are aluminum. They are just coated with ceramic on the top. Such models are less expensive, but you need to be extra careful when using them. This coating can chip or peel, revealing less quality metal below. These peeled areas can snag your hair! So always try to find out if an iron is coated or not. You can even find costly professional models that are not 100% ceramic. Solid or pure ceramic are words that you are looking for. I'm not sure if this brush is ceramic, titanium or what..?!? Titanium vs. Ceramic In this battle, it is obvious that titanium is a winner. But does this mean that you should use only this type of iron? No. Many experts say that consumers should use ceramic for one obvious reason. Since titanium can get very hot and transfers heat better, its very easy to damage your hair if you are not careful. Also, this high heat is only advantageous for women with thick, coarse and stubborn hair. If your have thin or fragile hair, there is no need for high temperatures. In the end, it is up to you to find out what will work best for your hair. Now you have all the facts to make the right decision. If you are still indecisive, there is a simple solution! Get a flat iron that combines ceramic and titanium, such as Croc 2 Infrared mentioned above. This way you get ceramics safety and protection and titaniums speed and efficiency. review_text: LOVE LOVE LOVE! I have always wanted to get one of these fancy hair straightening brushes but just never got around to it until I saw this one online and decided to finally just purchase it. I am so glad I did! This brush is amazing! It is not only very easy to use, but works wonders. I will say that I do still love my straighter a little more because it does not pull my thin blonde hair as much, but it is well worth the money! I tired this brush on my sister who has very curly light brown hair and she was amazed at how well, and fast it straightened her hair. When it normally took her an hour to straighten her hair with my straighten only took her 15 minutes with this brush! The one down side to the brush is that the heat protectors on the hot bristle head are somewhat jell like. If you do not let the brush fully heat up to the temperature you would like to use, I have noticed that the brush will pull on more of your hair, possibly ripping it out. The color of this brush, a very pretty purple, and the black cord makes the brush look very high class. The brush looks and works like a brush that should cost much more than $50. Heck my straighter was was twice that much and is nothing compared to this hair straightening brush with my sisters hair. All in all, if you have thin, blonde hair like myself, this brush is nice to have but huge need to upgrade your flat iron straightener. BUT if you have super curly, thick hair, you should really think about getting this brush! You will not regret it! review_text: I only have sparse hairs where my eyebrows should be, so in order for me to feel comfortable out in public, I need to draw in eyebrows. Unfortunately, my drawn in eyebrows always seem to wipe off or fade no matter what pencil I use. It's really frustrating to look in the mirror and see what has become of my brows after just a short time out. I wanted a product that would last longer, and when I saw that the Cardani Indelible Eyebrow Makeup Stick, claimed to do just that, I decided to give it a try. This eyebrow makeup stick is described as being smudge proof and water proof. I have worn it out, and so far it really does seem to hold up well. The company created the product using a long lasting formula and it has withstood even my trips to the gym where I sweat and rub my face quite often with a towel. It definitely works better than any eyebrow pencils I have tried in the past. Overall, I am satisfied with this eyebrow makeup stick. Its quality is very high and there is a brush on one end to help me soften the pencil and make my brows look less fake and drawn in. Another design feature that I appreciate is the fact that this pencil does not require sharpening. When the tip gets flat, I simply twist the pencil and release more product. I am very happy I ordered this! I can now go out without being embarrassed about my non-existent eyebrows! I must disclose that this product was received at a discounted cost for my honest and unbiased review. My opinion was not altered due to the product being discounted. If I do not believe in a product, I will not give it a positive rating. Please leave a comment if you have any further questions. Thanks for taking the time to read my review!

review_text: This product was provided at a discounted price in exchange for my honest review. That being said, I really liked this hair removal system. I absolutely hate shaving my legs. It's like slippery, naked, yoga, but with a razor in a tiny shower. No thank you! I didn't even know what an epilator was until I saw this product and looked it up. Is it a little painful? Yes. Is it easier for me than shaving? Yes. I also like that it's rechargeable and you just buy the one product. Buying razors is expensive. I find this to be a much better option. Another plus is that hair regrowth seems to be softer, as in it's not stubble, but actual hair regrowing. I really like it. A down side to literally ripping out each hair is the pain, but that's not necessarily a flaw of this product because that's the nature of epilating. It's like slow waxing that's way less messy. For me, this is perfect. Also, this epilator has little massagers on it that help reduce the pain. I have nothing to compare it to, so I don't know if it actually does, but that is a plus. This system also comes with a face guard, so you can pull hairs from your face as well. It's alright for longer hairs, but I really didn't buy it with the intention of using it on my face. There is also a shaving head but I have not used that yet because I really don't have much use for that. I'm really glad that I bought this product and have no regrets what so ever. I would 100% recommend this product to a friend, assuming they can handle the pain.

review_summary: Best hand/body cream I've ever used.
review_text: I love this hand/body cream! I love the fact that it is all natural and non toxic. This is my second purchase. The first jar lasted most of the winter. And, it saved my fingers. My skin gets very dry during the winter and the skin actually splits around my fingernails. I used this cream every night on my hands and my skin did not split. I put it on liberally at night and rubbed it in for a few minutes because I wanted to make sure my hands were well hydrated prior to going to bed. And it worked great. To the purchaser who said it was greasy, at first it feels a little greasy going on but when it is adequately rubbed in that feeling dissipates fairly quickly. Also, this is not the type of cream that I would use on my face. It's too heavy/thick and greasy for your face. I would use a cream specifically made for the face. And, it is unscented, which is a plus. I purchased a different hand cream on Amazon after this first purchase as I wanted one that was not as thick, but I had to return it because the smell was nauseating. So, I decided I'd stay with the tried and true. I'm hoping they make a thinner version of this one someday. But, I still highly recommend purchasing it.
product_title: Best tattoo care: Unscented Shea Butter Argan Whipped Body Butter for SENSITIVE Rough, Dry, Flaky, Hard, and Cracked Skin
product_description: Finally, get over your rough patches. Just a touch of this impressive whipped hand and body cream will soften stubbornly dry skin. Blends right in and is silky to the touch--never wet, streaky, or oily. Some body butter labels instruct you to "slather" the product on; that's a clue the product has a large percentage of water or other nonfunctional thickening fillers. Our concentrated products are made to be efficient, portable, and environmentally friendly, not fill impressively large bottles and jars. Our plant-based formulation--combining shea butter's natural protection, argan oil's restorative properties, jojoba's similarity to natural oils in the skin, and meadowfoam oil's ability to absorb very quickly into the skin leaving a non-oily finish, and a touch of cocoa butter--masterfully makes the most of organic, natural, and naturally derived ingredients. Soy wax takes the place of endangered beeswax found in many natural creams and provides a soft, nutritive depth and silky, dry finish that holds in your skin's natural moisture--and our premium ingredients--through the day. We don't use any silicones, mineral oil, or other petroleum products often found in traditional thick creams. Excellent for daily tattoo care and "tight" inked skin; you can dress immediately after applying. This whip also defrizzes hair (or beard) and adds a subtle shine; depending on your hair type and length, start with the smallest bit rubbed into your palms, or just crunch your curls or straight ends after moisturizing your hands. This unscented, natural, vegetable-based cream makes an excellent diaper cream--take up a touch of cream with a tissue or cotton swab to keep the product sanitary for the long life of the jar. Unscented. Vegan, phthalate-free, paraben-free, natural and organic oils, cruelty-free. We guarantee you will see and feel great results with this beautifully formulated multi-purpose cream. review_text: Although I make my own whipped body lotion, I didn't have time nor materials at hand, so I impulsively bought this to save time. I'm so glad that I did. This product is absolutely wonderful. I use it all over, but it is light enough to put on my face. It's so much less greasy than the shea butter and jojoba lotions that I concoct myself. I gave my first order to my daughter who just delivered a premature baby; her hands were cracked and bleeding from having to scrub them before going into the NICU. After applying this, there was immediate, visible improvement. I highly recommend this lotion, and I have ordered it more than once.

review_text: First, let me tell you about my hair. I have fine straight hair like the girl in the picture, however I am prone to frizz on the days that I blow dry or when it is humid. I had tried several flattening irons only to find them too hot even on the lowest setting and have them snag my hair. I had seen several videos on these brushes and was intrigued but worried about further damage to my hair, however the low price on this brush was enough incentive for me to give it a try. I am so glad I did! I set it to 195 to start and it worked beautifully! I did use a protective serum on my hair before I used the brush and after a few quick passes..smooth hair. I'm not sure if this brush would work on super thick hair but on my hair and my daughters hair that is fine and slightly curly it worked wonderfully! Very glad I purchased this and will probably order a second before this one disappears into my daughters room!
